Method: 采用制度经济学中的"公地悲剧"理论框架，结合Ostrom的持久公共资源制度设计原则，分析AI slop问题的结构性原因，并提出针对工具开发者、团队领导和教育工作者的具体解决方案。

Result: 识别出AI slop问题的核心矛盾：生成成本低但审查成本高，且审查层已经薄弱。个人克制无法解决这一公地问题，需要制度性解决方案。

Conclusion: 需要基于Ostrom的设计原则建立持久的公共资源制度，为工具开发者、团队领导和教育工作者提供具体行动指南，以应对AI slop带来的系统性挑战，保护软件开发社区的共享资源。

Abstract: In this article, we argue that AI slop in software is creating a tragedy of the commons. Individual productivity gains from AI-generated content externalize costs onto reviewer capacity, codebase integrity, public knowledge resources, collaborative trust, and the talent pipeline. AI slop is cheap to generate and expensive to review, and the review layer is already thin. Commons problems are not solved by individual restraint. We outline concrete next steps for tool developers, team leads, and educators, grounded in Ostrom's design principles for enduring commons institutions.

</details>


### [493] [Mitigating Prompt-Induced Cognitive Biases in General-Purpose AI for Software Engineering](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.16756)
*Francesco Sovrano,Gabriele Dominici,Alberto Bacchelli*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: 研究发现提示诱导的认知偏见会影响通用AI在软件工程决策中的表现，现有提示工程方法无法显著降低偏见敏感性，但通过引出最佳实践和注入公理推理线索的新方法可将偏见敏感性平均降低51%。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 软件工程决策支持中，自然语言输入的小幅措辞变化（如流行性暗示或结果揭示）可能导致通用AI系统做出次优决策，这种提示诱导的认知偏见在实际应用中具有重要影响。

Method: 使用PROBE-SWE动态基准测试，配对同一软件工程困境的有偏和无偏版本，控制逻辑和难度，针对八种软件工程相关偏见。测试常见提示工程策略后，提出新方法：引出最佳实践并在回答前注入公理推理线索。

Result: 常见提示工程策略（如思维链、自我去偏）在单个偏见基础上无统计显著降低效果。新方法将总体偏见敏感性平均降低51%（p < .001）。主题分析揭示了与高度偏见敏感性相关的语言模式。

Conclusion: 提示工程现有方法在实践中无法有效缓解偏见敏感性，但通过引出隐含假设和注入公理推理的新方法能显著改善。研究还识别了何时应谨慎使用通用AI进行软件工程决策支持，为未来对策提供方向。

Abstract: Prompt-induced cognitive biases are changes in a general-purpose AI (GPAI) system's decisions caused solely by biased wording in the input (e.g., framing, anchors), not task logic. In software engineering (SE) decision support (where problem statements and requirements are natural language) small phrasing shifts (e.g., popularity hints or outcome reveals) can push GPAI models toward suboptimal decisions. We study this with PROBE-SWE, a dynamic benchmark for SE that pairs biased and unbiased versions of the same SE dilemmas, controls for logic and difficulty, and targets eight SE-relevant biases (anchoring, availability, bandwagon, confirmation, framing, hindsight, hyperbolic discounting, overconfidence). We ask whether prompt engineering mitigates bias sensitivity in practice, focusing on actionable techniques that practitioners can apply off-the-shelf in real environments. Testing common strategies (e.g., chain-of-thought, self-debiasing) on cost-effective GPAI systems, we find no statistically significant reductions in bias sensitivity on a per-bias basis. We then adopt a Prolog-style view of the reasoning process: solving SE dilemmas requires making explicit any background axioms and inference assumptions (i.e., SE best practices) that are usually implicit in the prompt. So, we hypothesize that bias-inducing features short-circuit assumptions elicitation, pushing GPAI models toward biased shortcuts. Building on this, we introduce an end-to-end method that elicits best practices and injects axiomatic reasoning cues into the prompt before answering, reducing overall bias sensitivity by 51% on average (p < .001). Finally, we report a thematic analysis that surfaces linguistic patterns associated with heightened bias sensitivity, clarifying when GPAI use is less advisable for SE decision support and where to focus future countermeasures.

</details>


### [494] [Exploring Ethical Concerns of Mobile Applications from App Reviews: A Literature Survey](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.16770)
*Aakash Sorathiya,Gouri Ginde*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: 这篇论文对2012年以来37项相关研究进行了系统性综述，分析了用户通过应用评论表达的隐私、安全、可访问性等伦理关切，提出了自动化提取和分类伦理关切的研究议程。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 应用商店中的用户评论包含了大量关于隐私、安全、可访问性等非功能性需求的伦理关切，但这些信息通常混杂在其他类型的评论中，缺乏系统性的研究综述来理解用户如何通过评论表达伦理关切。

Method: 采用系统性文献综述方法，从553项初始研究中筛选出37项相关研究（2012年以来），分析这些研究的目标、方法论、策略以及使用的额外资源（如应用隐私政策）。

Result: 研究发现用户评论中持续存在隐私、安全、可访问性、透明度、公平性、问责制和安全性等方面的障碍。研究覆盖的评论数量从500到6.26亿条不等，涉及的应用数量从单个应用到130万个应用。

Conclusion: 该综述为开发者和系统架构师在开发早期识别和优先处理非功能性需求提供了指导，并为研究人员提出了四个关键领域的研究议程，包括自动化提取和分类伦理关切相关的应用评论。

Abstract: Privacy, security, and accessibility, like ethical concerns in mobile applications (a.k.a. apps), commonly subsumed under non-functional requirements, are generally reported by users through app reviews available in app stores. However, these remain unidentified among other types of reviews, such as user experiences, problem reports, and new feature discussions. Over the past decade, extensive research has focused on extracting valuable information from app reviews, including feature requests and bug reports. However, there remains a lack of a synthesis of research related to app review analysis for exploring users' ethical concerns. This paper presents a comprehensive survey of this research area, covering 37 relevant studies published since 2012, identified from the initial 553 studies using specific inclusion and exclusion criteria. The studies examined vary in review counts, ranging from 500 to 626 million, and include between a single and 1.3 million apps. Our detailed analysis highlights diverse objectives, methodologies, and strategies, along with additional resources such as app privacy policies, which researchers generally utilize to analyze ethical concerns. Our findings also identify persistent barriers to privacy, security, accessibility, transparency, fairness, accountability, and safety, as reported by users in app reviews. Furthermore, we propose a research agenda that focuses on four key areas, including automated extraction and classification of ethical concerns-related app reviews. Our survey outcomes can assist developers and system architects in recognizing and prioritizing non-functional requirements at the initial stages of the development lifecycle, whereas researchers can expand upon this synthesis to create tools for the automated detection of ethical concerns.

</details>


### [495] [Bias in the Loop: Auditing LLM-as-a-Judge for Software Engineering](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.16790)
*Zixiao Zhao,Amirreza Esmaeili,Fatemeh Fard*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: LLM作为代码评估法官存在严重的提示偏见问题，即使代码片段不变，微小的提示修改也能显著改变评估结果，威胁代码评估的有效性和可复现性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 随着LLM越来越多地被用作代码评估的法官，特别是在无法进行详尽人工审查或可执行测试覆盖的情况下，需要对其可靠性和偏见进行系统研究。当前实践缺乏对可靠性和偏见的原理性解释。

Method: 采用测量优先的方法，分析代码生成、代码修复和测试生成三个任务中的两种点式评估机制，系统探究提示诱导的偏见。研究考虑重复运行的难度级别和受控的提示干预，每次隔离一个呈现线索，并使用一致性和偏见敏感性来评估法官。

Result: 法官决策对提示偏见高度敏感，即使底层代码片段不变。在所有三个任务中，几种偏见会系统性地将偏好转向提示偏好的选项，当该选项与黄金答案一致时提高准确性，否则显著降低准确性。在某些情况下，这些效应大到足以改变任务级结论和相对模型排名。

Conclusion: 报告的法官性能可能反映的是提示伪影而非稳定的评估能力，这对代码评估的有效性和可复现性构成直接威胁。因此，LLM作为法官的研究应报告偏见敏感性以及准确性，并纳入明确的控制措施，以支持软件工程中更可信的模型比较。

Abstract: Large Language Models are increasingly used as judges to evaluate code artifacts when exhaustive human review or executable test coverage is unavailable. LLM-judge is increasingly relevant in agentic software engineering workflows, where it can help rank candidate solutions and guide patch selection. While attractive for scale, current practice lacks a principled account of reliability and bias: repeated evaluations of the same case can disagree; small prompt edits can swing outcomes; and seemingly semantics-preserving, human-equivalent perturbations may elicit divergent verdicts. This paper studies LLM-as-a-Judge for code through a measurement-first lens. We analyze two pointwise judging regimes across code generation, code repair task, and test generation, and we systematically probe prompt-induced biases. Our study considers difficulty levels for repeated runs and controlled prompt interventions that isolate one presentation cue at a time, and it evaluates judges using consistency and sensitivity to bias. We find that judge decisions are highly sensitive to prompt biases even when the underlying code snippet is unchanged. Across all three tasks, several biases systematically shift preferences toward the option favored by the prompt, improving accuracy when that option aligns with the gold answer but substantially reducing it otherwise. In some settings, these effects are large enough to change task-level conclusions and alter relative model rankings. These findings show that reported judge performance may reflect prompt artifacts rather than stable assessment ability, posing a direct threat to the validity and reproducibility of code evaluation. We therefore argue that LLM-as-a-Judge studies should report bias sensitivity alongside accuracy and incorporate explicit controls to support more trustworthy model comparison in software engineering.

</details>


### [496] [Gleaner: A Semantically-Rich and Efficient Online Sampler for Microservice Diagnostics](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.16810)
*Yifan Yang,Aoyang FANG,Songhan Zhang,Pinjia He*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: Gleaner是一个在线尾部采样框架，通过"bag-of-edges"表示和集合操作替代昂贵的图分析，在1%采样率下显著提升RCA准确性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 微服务分布式追踪产生海量数据需要智能采样，但现有基于图分析的尾部采样器计算开销大，无法用于在线场景。

Method: 将追踪表示为增强日志语义的"bag-of-edges"，用高效集合操作替代图算法，采用告警驱动配额和多样性保持策略优先采样异常和稀有追踪。

Result: 每个追踪处理仅需0.74ms，追踪模式覆盖率提升128.7%，香农熵提升32.9%，1%采样率下RCA准确性比次优采样器提升42%-107%。

Conclusion: Gleaner将智能采样从数据缩减技术转变为强大的信号增强范式，其采样数据比完整未采样数据集的RCA准确性更高。

Abstract: Distributed tracing in microservices is critical for diagnostics but generates overwhelming data volumes, necessitating intelligent sampling. To maximize fidelity, state-of-the-art (SOTA) tail-based samplers analyze complete (or even log-enriched) traces by modeling them as graphs. However, this reliance on computationally expensive graph analysis creates a performance bottleneck that prohibits their use in online settings.
  To this end, we propose Gleaner, an online tail-sampling framework that breaks this trade-off. It is founded on the key insight that explicit graph structures are unnecessary for high-fidelity trace grouping. Instead, Gleaner represents each trace as a "bag-of-edges" augmented with log semantics, replacing slow graph algorithms with highly efficient set-based operations. It also employs an alarm-driven quota and a diversity-preserving strategy to prioritize anomalous and rare traces for downstream Root Cause Analysis (RCA). Experimentally, Gleaner processes traces at 0.74ms each, improving Trace Pattern Coverage by up to 128.7% and Shannon Entropy by up to 32.9% over baselines. At just a 1% sampling rate, Gleaner improves RCA accuracy by 42%-107% over the next-best sampler. Moreover, RCA on Gleaner's sampled data is more accurate than with the entire, unsampled dataset. This result reframes intelligent sampling from a data reduction technique to a powerful signal enhancement paradigm for automated operations.

</details>


### [497] [Treating Run-time Execution History as a First-Class Citizen: Co-Versioning Run-time Behavior alongside Code](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.16933)
*Marcus Kessel*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: 论文提出"行为协同版本控制"范式，将Git历史与行为档案耦合，存储运行时观测数据，支持语义差异分析和行为感知的回归定位


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前开发实践中，开发者通常用Git版本控制源代码，但很少持久化和查询运行时行为如何跨版本演化。这种不匹配导致软件演化分析和CI中存在盲点，丰富的执行信息被丢弃，通常简化为通过/失败结果，忽略了部分测试预言、测试不稳定性、静默输出或性能漂移等问题。

Method: 提出行为协同版本控制范式，将Git历史与行为档案（一个可追加、可查询的存储）耦合。行为档案存储选定的运行时观测数据（如方法I/O和性能信号），按提交和测试上下文索引。基于代码/测试/行为指纹设计最小数据模型和变更诊断，并通过笔记本电脑规模的原型系统验证可行性，该系统重放Python项目历史提交，在本地Parquet存储中归档运行时观测数据。

Result: 原型系统能够检测从文本差异中不明显的行为变化，展示了行为协同版本控制的可行性。该方法支持语义差异分析、行为感知的回归定位和追溯审计，通过查询历史执行记录来补充主动的、特定信号的监控工具。

Conclusion: 行为协同版本控制通过将Git历史与运行时行为档案耦合，填补了软件演化分析和CI中的盲点，为开发者提供了更丰富的演化分析能力，能够检测传统版本控制无法捕获的行为变化。

Abstract: Behavioral Co-Versioning remains absent from mainstream practice: while developers routinely version source code with Git, they rarely persist and query how run-time behavior evolves across revisions. This paper argues that this mismatch contributes to a blind spot in software evolution analysis and CI, where rich execution information is discarded and typically reduced to pass/fail outcomes -- despite partial test oracles, flakiness, and silent output or performance drift. We propose \textit{Behavioral Co-Versioning}, a paradigm that couples the Git history with a \textit{Behavioral Archive}: an append-only, queryable store of selected run-time observations (e.g., method I/O and performance signals) collected during test runs and keyed by commit and test context. This enables semantic diffing, behavior-aware regression localization, and retrospective auditing by querying historical executions, complementing proactive, signal-specific monitoring tools. We first outline a minimal data model and change diagnostics based on code/test/behavior fingerprints, and then demonstrate feasibility with a laptop-scale prototype that replays historical commits of a Python project, archives run-time observations in a local Parquet-backed store, and detects behavioral changes not apparent from textual diffs.

</details>


### [498] [MEMRES: A Memory-Augmented Resolver with Confidence Cascade for Agentic Python Dependency Resolution](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.16941)
*Dao Sy Duy Minh,Tran Chi Nguyen,Trung Kiet Huynh,Pham Phu Hoa,Nguyen Lam Phu Quy,Vu Nguyen*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: MEMRES是一个用于Python依赖解析的智能系统，采用多级置信度级联，将LLM作为最后手段，通过自演进内存、错误模式知识库、语义导入分析器和Python 2启发式检测器，显著提升依赖解析成功率。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有的Python依赖解析方法（如PLLM）成功率较低（54.7%），需要更高效的解决方案来处理复杂的依赖关系，特别是考虑到Python 2/3兼容性、语义导入分析等实际问题。

Method: MEMRES采用多级置信度级联架构：1）自演进内存积累可重用解析模式；2）包含200+条导入-包映射的错误模式知识库；3）语义导入分析器；4）Python 2启发式检测器。LLM仅在最后阶段使用。

Result: 在HG2.9K数据集上使用Gemma-2 9B（10GB VRAM），MEMRES解析了2890个代码片段中的2503个，成功率达到86.6%（10次运行平均），远超PLLM的54.7%成功率。

Conclusion: MEMRES通过结合自演进内存和多级置信度级联，显著提升了Python依赖解析的效率和准确性，为依赖管理提供了更可靠的解决方案。

Abstract: We present MEMRES, an agentic system for Python dependency resolution that introduces a multi-level confidence cascade where the LLM serves as the last resort. Our system combines: (1) a Self-Evolving Memory that accumulates reusable resolution patterns via tips and shortcuts; (2) an Error Pattern Knowledge Base with 200+ curated import-to-package mappings; (3) a Semantic Import Analyzer; and (4) a Python 2 heuristic detector resolving the largest failure category. On HG2.9K using Gemma-2 9B (10 GB VRAM). MEMRES resolves 2503 of 2890 (86.6%, 10-run average) snippets, combining intra-session memory with our confidence cascade for the remainder. This already exceeds PLLM's 54.7% overall success rate by a wide margin.

</details>


### [499] [HELO-APR: Enhancing Low-Resource Program Repair through Cross-Lingual Knowledge Transfer](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.17016)
*Zhipeng Wang,Boyang Yang,Yidong Wan,Liuye Guo,You Lv,Tao Zheng,Zhuowei Wang,Tieke He*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: HELO-APR是一个两阶段自动程序修复框架，通过从高资源编程语言向低资源编程语言进行跨语言知识迁移，解决了LLM在低资源语言上修复效果差的问题。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 大型语言模型在高资源编程语言的自动程序修复上表现良好，但在低资源编程语言上效果显著下降，主要原因是缺乏足够的已验证的bug-fix训练数据对。

Method: HELO-APR采用两阶段方法：1) 从高资源语言的bug-fix对合成高质量的低资源语言训练数据，保持缺陷类型一致性并确保代码符合语言习惯；2) 采用课程学习策略，逐步进行高资源语言修复学习、跨语言修复对齐和低资源语言修复适应。

Result: 在xCodeEval基准测试中，使用C++作为源语言，Ruby和Rust作为目标语言，HELO-APR显著优于基线方法。在DeepSeek-Coder-6.7B上Pass@1从31.32%提升到48.65%，在CodeLlama-7B上从1.67%提升到11.97%。在CodeLlama上的目标编译率从49.77%提升到91.98%。在Defects4Ruby上，BLEU-4从61.20提升到66.79，ROUGE-1从76.76提升到83.59。

Conclusion: 经过验证的跨语言监督为改进低资源语言中基于LLM的程序修复提供了可重用的方法，通过从高资源语言迁移修复知识可以有效提升低资源语言的修复效果。

Abstract: Large Language Models (LLMs) perform well on automatic program repair (APR) for high-resource programming languages (HRPLs), but their effectiveness drops sharply in low-resource programming languages (LRPLs), due to a lack of sufficient verified buggy-fixed pairs for APR training. To address this challenge, we propose HELO-APR (High-resource Enabled LOw-resource APR), a two-stage APR framework that enables cross-lingual transfer of repair knowledge from HRPLs to LRPLs. HELO-APR (1) constructs high-quality LRPL training data by synthesizing LRPL buggy-fixed pairs from HRPL counterparts, preserving defect type consistency while ensuring the synthesized code is idiomatic, and then (2) adopts a curriculum learning strategy that progressively performs HRPL repair learning, cross-lingual repair alignment, and LRPL repair adaptation, improving repair effectiveness in LRPLs. Using C++ as the source HRPL and Ruby and Rust as the target LRPLs, experiments on xCodeEval show that HELO-APR consistently outperforms strong baselines, increasing Pass@1 from 31.32% to 48.65% on DeepSeek-Coder-6.7B and from 1.67% to 11.97% on CodeLlama-7B, while improving syntactic validity by raising the average target compilation rate on CodeLlama from 49.77% to 91.98%. On Defects4Ruby, HELO-APR increases BLEU-4 from 61.20 to 66.79 and ROUGE-1 from 76.76 to 83.59 on CodeLlama-7B, indicating higher similarity to developer patches in real-world settings. Finally, we conduct ablation studies to assess the necessity of each core component. These results suggest that verified cross-lingual supervision provides a reusable approach for improving LLM-based repair in low-resource languages.

</details>


### [500] [Workstream: A Local-First Developer Command Center for the AI-Augmented Engineering Workflow](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.17055)
*Happy Bhati*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: Workstream是一个开源、本地优先的开发者命令中心，整合了GitHub、Jira、Slack等多种开发工具，通过AI就绪度评分、历史评审智能和代理可观测性等功能，减少工具碎片化带来的认知负担。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现代软件工程师每天需要在5-10个分散的工具间切换（如GitHub、Jira、Slack等），这种碎片化导致认知负担增加，打断深度工作，并延迟对关键工程信号的响应。

Method: 开发了Workstream系统，包含：1）系统架构；2）新颖的5类别AI就绪度评分算法；3）从历史PR评审中挖掘团队特定模式的评审智能管道；4）实现模型上下文协议（MCP）、代理到代理（A2A）和代理可观测性协议（AOP）的代理可观测层。

Result: 通过应用于自身开发的案例研究显示，AI就绪度评分显著提升：内部扫描器从48提高到98，独立的agentready CLI从41.6提高到73.7。

Conclusion: Workstream作为Apache 2.0许可的开源项目发布，有效整合了分散的开发工具，减少了认知负担，提高了开发效率和AI就绪度。

Abstract: Modern software engineers operate across 5-10 disconnected tools daily: GitHub, GitLab, Jira, Slack, calendar applications, CI dashboards, AI coding assistants, and container platforms. This fragmentation creates cognitive overhead that interrupts deep work and delays response to critical engineering signals. We present Workstream, an open-source, local-first developer command center that aggregates pull requests, task management, calendar, AI-powered code review, historical review intelligence, repository AI-readiness scoring, and agent observability into a single interface. We describe the system architecture, a novel 5-category AI readiness scoring algorithm, a review intelligence pipeline that mines historical PR reviews for team-specific patterns, and an agent observability layer implementing the Model Context Protocol (MCP), Agent-to-Agent (A2A), and Agent Observability Protocol (AOP). Through a case study of applying the tool to its own development, we demonstrate measurable improvements in AI-readiness scores (48 to 98 on our internal scanner; 41.6 to 73.7 on the independent agentready CLI). Workstream is released as open source under the Apache 2.0 license at https://github.com/happybhati/workstream.

</details>


### [501] [AI Observability for Developer Productivity Tools: Bridging Cost Awareness and Code Quality](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.17092)
*Happy Bhati,Twinkll Sisodia*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: 开发者为应对AI辅助工具激增带来的成本、质量和行为模式理解挑战，提出了统一的AI可观测性方案，结合实时令牌追踪、可配置定价注册表、响应验证和成本分析，提供单面板仪表板。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 随着AI辅助开发工具激增，开发者面临理解AI交互成本、质量和行为模式的挑战，需要统一的可观测性方案来监控和管理AI使用。

Method: 结合两个互补系统：Workstream（开发者生产力仪表板，集中管理PR、Jira任务和AI代码审查）和AI可观测性汇总器（监控推理工作负载，使用Prometheus指标和多提供商LLM网关）。采用实时令牌追踪（替代启发式估计）、24模型定价注册表、响应验证管道、LLM驱动的审查智能和可导出报告。

Result: 在六个月开发工作流评估中，系统捕获每次审查成本与提供商账单差异小于2%，相比手动追踪将AI使用模式洞察时间减少一个数量级。

Conclusion: 统一的AI可观测性方案能准确追踪成本并显著提升开发者对AI使用模式的洞察效率，为AI辅助开发工具管理提供了有效解决方案。

Abstract: As AI-assisted development tools proliferate, developers face a growing challenge: understanding the cost, quality, and behavioral patterns of AI interactions across their workflow. We present a unified approach to AI observability for developer productivity tools, combining real-time token tracking, configurable model pricing registries, response validation, and cost analytics into a single-pane dashboard. Our work synthesizes two complementary systems -- Workstream, a developer productivity dashboard that centralizes pull requests, Jira tasks, and AI code reviews; and an AI observability summarizer that monitors inference workloads with Prometheus-backed metrics and multi-provider LLM gateways. We describe the architectural patterns adopted, the implementation of real token tracking from provider APIs (replacing heuristic estimation), a 24-model pricing registry, response validation pipelines, LLM-powered review intelligence, and exportable reports. Our evaluation on a six-month development workflow shows the system captures per-review cost with less than 2% variance from provider billing and reduces time-to-insight for AI usage patterns by an order of magnitude compared to manual tracking.

</details>


### [502] [Layer-wise MoE Routing Locality under Shared-Prefix Code Generation: Token-Identity Decomposition and Compile-Equivalent Fork Redundancy](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.17182)
*Shun-ichiro Hayashi,Daichi Mukunoki,Tetsuya Hoshino,Takahiro Katagiri*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: 研究LLM代码生成中多候选代码的MoE专家路由重叠模式，发现相同token位置路由相似度极高，不同token位置仍有显著相似性，中间层呈现特殊交叉模式


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 在LLM代码生成中，多个候选代码通常从相同提示并行生成（如best-of-N采样或多候选补全），这些请求可以通过公共前缀共享KV缓存，但它们的MoE专家路由重叠程度以及这种重叠在不同层间的变化尚未充分理解

Method: 使用Qwen3.5-35B-A3B-FP8模型（256个路由专家，top-8），通过树搜索分支生成从共享前缀生成代码（851个完成代码，温度0.7），并使用基于编译器输出的对齐方法（gcc -S -O0汇编）控制token身份混淆

Result: 1. 相同token位置Jaccard相似度达0.649（40倍随机），不同token位置仍保持0.175（11倍随机）；2. 层分解显示交叉模式：相同token路由相似度在所有层都超过不同token，但在中间层（L14-20）下降，而不同token相似度在中间层达到峰值（14倍随机）；3. 树搜索代码生成中，67%成功编译代码集中在top三个汇编等价组，组内99.6%差异为注释和空行

Conclusion: 通过层分解细化了先前工作的"上下文无关路由"主张，表明top-P搜索（包括束搜索）中的多样性构成重大挑战，为改进LLM代码生成中的搜索效率提供了机会

Abstract: In LLM-based code generation, multiple code candidates are often generated in parallel from the same prompt -- for example, in best-of-N sampling or multi-candidate code completion. These requests can share KV caches through a common prefix, yet the extent to which their Mixture-of-Experts (MoE) expert routing overlaps, and how this overlap varies across layers, remains insufficiently understood. We study Qwen3.5-35B-A3B-FP8 (256 routed experts, top-8) by performing tree-search-based branching generation from a shared prefix (851 completed codes, temperature 0.7) and analyzing the results with a compiler-output-based alignment (gcc -S -O0 assembly) that controls for token-identity confounds. Our findings are threefold: (1) At positions where both sequences generated the same token, Jaccard similarity reaches 0.649 (40x random), while even at positions with different tokens it remains 0.175 (11x random). (2) A layer-wise decomposition reveals a crossing pattern: same-token routing similarity exceeds different-token similarity across all layers, but dips in the middle layers (L14-20), while different-token similarity peaks in the middle layers at 14x random. (3) In tree-search code generation, 67% of successfully compiled codes concentrate in the top three assembly-equivalent groups, and 99.6% of within-group differences consist of comments and blank lines. We show that diversity in top-P search, including beam search, poses a significant challenge. These results refine the "context-independent routing" claim of prior work through layer-wise decomposition and suggest opportunities for improving search efficiency in LLM code generation.

</details>


### [503] [SynthFix: Adaptive Neuro-Symbolic Code Vulnerability Repair](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.17184)
*Yifan Zhang,Jieyu Li,Kexin Pei,Yu Huang,Kevin Leach*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: SynthFix是一个混合神经符号框架，通过结合代码合成与编译器反馈，提升LLM在漏洞修复中的性能，在JavaScript和C基准测试中取得显著改进。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 大型语言模型在自动化代码修复方面有潜力，但难以满足复杂的语义和结构正确性要求，需要更有效的修复方法。

Method: 提出SynthFix混合神经符号框架，采用自适应训练策略：神经路由模型将代码样本分配到监督微调（学习常见模式）或奖励微调（使用符号奖励进行复杂迭代精炼）。

Result: 在FixJS（JavaScript）和CodeFlaws（C）基准测试中，SynthFix相比强基线在CodeBLEU/CrystalBLEU上获得最高18%相对改进，在Exact Match上获得32%改进。

Conclusion: 这种自适应训练策略组合（模拟开发者在模式应用和工具反馈间的切换）显著提高了LLM漏洞修复的准确性和效率。

Abstract: Large Language Models (LLMs) show promise for automated code repair but often struggle with the complex semantic and structural correctness required. We present SynthFix, a hybrid neural-symbolic framework that improves LLM-based vulnerability repair by unifying code synthesis with compiler-informed symbolic feedback. The core of our approach is an adaptive training strategy where a neural Router Model directs code samples to either Supervised Fine-Tuning (SFT) to learn common patterns or Reward Fine-Tuning (RFT) with symbolic rewards for complex, iterative refinement. On the FixJS (JavaScript) and CodeFlaws (C) benchmarks, SynthFix achieves up to 18% relative improvement in CodeBLEU/CrystalBLEU and 32% in Exact Match over strong SFT and RFT baselines. Our results show that this adaptive combination of training strategies, which mirrors how developers alternate between pattern application and tool feedback, significantly improves the accuracy and efficiency of LLM-based vulnerability repair. Our code and data are available at https://github.com/CoderDoge1108/SynthFix.

</details>


### [504] [Persona-Based Requirements Engineering for Explainable Multi-Agent Educational Systems: A Scenario Simulator for Clinical Reasoning Training](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.17186)
*Weibing Zheng,Laurah Turner,Jess Kropczynski,Matthew Kelleher,Murat Ozer,Shane Halse*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种以人为先、角色驱动的可解释多智能体教育系统需求工程框架，并通过临床推理训练系统验证了其有效性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 随着AI和多智能体系统在教育、医疗等领域的广泛应用，确保多智能体教育系统从需求工程阶段就具备可解释性至关重要。可解释性有助于建立信任、促进透明度，并实现有效的人机协作。虽然角色建模在人机交互中已被广泛用于代表用户需求，但在可解释多智能体教育系统的需求工程中仍未被充分探索。

Method: 提出了一个以人为先、角色驱动的可解释多智能体教育系统需求工程框架。该框架将角色和用户故事整合到整个需求工程过程中，捕捉医疗教育者、医学生、AI患者代理、临床代理（体格检查代理、诊断代理、临床干预代理、监督代理、评估代理）等各利益相关者的需求、目标和交互。通过角色建模来指导可解释性需求，并应用于临床推理训练场景。

Result: 超过78%的医学生报告称多智能体教育系统提高了他们的临床推理能力。该框架成功地将技术需求与非技术背景的医学生从人本角度连接起来，确保可解释的多智能体教育系统从AI系统工程早期阶段就具备可信性、可解释性，并与真实临床场景保持一致。

Conclusion: 基于角色的需求工程方法能够有效连接技术需求与非技术用户，确保可解释的多智能体教育系统从早期阶段就具备可信性、可解释性，并与实际应用场景对齐。该框架为开发可信赖的AI系统提供了人本导向的方法论支持。

Abstract: As Artificial Intelligence (AI) and Agentic AI become increasingly integrated across sectors such as education and healthcare, it is critical to ensure that Multi-Agent Education System (MAES) is explainable from the early stages of requirements engineering (RE) within the AI software development lifecycle. Explainability is essential to build trust, promote transparency, and enable effective human-AI collaboration. Although personas are well-established in human-computer interaction to represent users and capture their needs and behaviors, their role in RE for explainable MAES remains underexplored. This paper proposes a human-first, persona-driven, explainable MAES RE framework and demonstrates the framework through a MAES for clinical reasoning training. The framework integrates personas and user stories throughout the RE process to capture the needs, goals, and interactions of various stakeholders, including medical educators, medical students, AI patient agent, and clinical agents (physical exam agent, diagnostic agent, clinical intervention agent, supervisor agent, evaluation agent). The goals, underlying models, and knowledge base shape agent interactions and inform explainability requirements that guided the clinical reasoning training of medical students. A post-usage survey found that more than 78\% of medical students reported that MAES improved their clinical reasoning skills. These findings demonstrate that RE based on persona effectively connects technical requirements with non-technical medical students from a human-centered approach, ensuring that explainable MAES are trustworthy, interpretable, and aligned with authentic clinical scenarios from the early stages of the AI system engineering. The partial MAES for the clinical scenario simulator is~\href{https://github.com/2sigmaEdTech/MAS/}{open sourced here}.

</details>


### [505] [React-ing to Grace Hopper 200: Five Open-Weights Coding Models, One React Native App, One GH200, One Weekend](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.17187)
*Alex Potanin*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: 评估5个开源编码模型在React Native应用生成任务上的表现，发现SWE-Bench排名不能预测实际任务性能，Kimi-K2.5在3位量化下表现最佳，并揭示了推理模型部署中的三个新发现。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 研究开源编码语言模型在实际多文件React Native应用生成任务中的真实表现，验证SWE-Bench基准排名是否能准确预测实际开发任务性能，并探索不同量化级别和模型架构对实际部署的影响。

Method: 在NVIDIA GH200 576GB硬件上评估5个先进开源编码模型：Kimi-K2.5（Q3和Q4量化）、GLM-5.1、Qwen3-Coder-480B和DeepSeek-V3.2。使用包含认证、用户每日计数和Web兼容性要求的React Native应用生成任务，评估生成项目是否能开箱即用及功能正确性。

Result: Kimi-K2.5在激进的3位量化（UD-Q3_K_XL，480GB）下产生最完整且符合规格的输出，超越了SWE-Bench Pro分数显著更高的模型。发现三个部署新现象：1）编码工具默认temperature=0会导致推理模型架构采样卡顿；2）推理模型的思考痕迹可能通过集成工具的文件路径解析器泄露；3）所有模型都存在原生移动API到Web平台适配的训练数据缺口。

Conclusion: SWE-Bench排名不能可靠预测实际编码任务性能，推理模型架构在部署时需要特殊配置调整，效率学派模型（10-15B活跃参数）能以约1/7的硬件成本达到与规模学派模型（32-40B活跃参数）相当的SWE-Bench结果。

Abstract: We evaluate five state-of-the-art open-weights coding language models -- Kimi-K2.5 (at Q3 and Q4 quantizations), GLM-5.1, Qwen3-Coder-480B, and DeepSeek-V3.2 -- on a single multi-file React Native application generation task on NVIDIA GH200 576 GB hardware. The task specifies authentication, per-user per-day counting, and web compatibility, and is evaluated on whether the generated project runs out-of-the-box and on feature-level correctness. We find that SWE-Bench rankings do not predict task performance: Kimi-K2.5 at aggressive 3-bit quantization (UD-Q3_K_XL, 480 GB) produces the most complete and specification-compliant output, outranking models with substantially higher SWE-Bench Pro scores. We document three novel deployment findings: (1) default temperature=0 in coding tools causes sampling hangs with reasoning-model architectures, (2) reasoning-model thinking traces can leak through integration tools' file-path parsers, and (3) web-platform adaptation of native-mobile APIs is a universal training-data gap across every model tested. We also map the hardware-tier structure of April 2026 open-weights coding models, identifying two architectural schools and showing that the efficiency school (10-15 B active parameters) delivers equivalent SWE-Bench results at roughly 1/7th the hardware cost of the scale school (32-40 B active parameters).

</details>


### [506] [From Language to Action: Enhancing LLM Task Efficiency with Task-Aware MCP Server Recommendation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.17234)
*Shiyu He,Zhiman Chen,Yuqi Zhao,Neng Zhang,Ran Mo,Yutao Ma*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: 本文提出Task2MCP数据集和T2MRec模型，解决LLM代理在MCP生态系统中寻找合适工具服务器的推荐问题，通过结构化检索和排序方法提升开发效率。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: MCP生态系统快速发展，LLM代理可通过标准化接口访问众多外部工具，但为特定开发任务选择合适的MCP服务器仍然困难。现有研究主要关注生态系统测量或工具调用优化，缺乏系统化的推荐框架和可复现的基准测试。

Method: 1) 构建Task2MCP数据集，系统地将分类基础开发任务与精选MCP服务器关联；2) 提出T2MRec推荐模型，建模语义相关性和结构兼容性生成初始候选集；3) 通过基于质心的候选扩展和基于约束LLM的重排序提升覆盖率和排序质量；4) 设计交互式MCP服务器推荐代理原型，支持动态决策。

Result: Task2MCP数据集为MCP工具推荐研究提供结构化监督和可复现评估环境。T2MRec模型能够有效推荐合适的MCP服务器，交互式代理原型帮助开发者高效评估和集成工具。

Conclusion: 本文通过构建数据集和推荐模型，解决了MCP生态系统中的工具服务器推荐问题，为开发者提供了系统化的解决方案，支持动态决策和高效工具集成。

Abstract: The rapid expansion of the model context protocol (MCP) ecosystem enables large language model (LLM)-based agents to access a wide range of external tools via a standardized interface. However, identifying appropriate MCP servers for a specific development task remains challenging. Existing studies primarily focus on measuring the MCP ecosystem or optimizing tool invocation mechanisms, while systematic recommendation frameworks and reproducible benchmarks for real-world development tasks remain largely unexplored. To address this limitation, we formulate task-oriented MCP server recommendation as a structured retrieval-and-ranking problem that jointly considers semantic relevance and engineering constraints. We first construct Task2MCP, a task-centered dataset that systematically associates taxonomy-grounded development tasks with curated MCP servers. This dataset provides structured supervision and a reproducible evaluation environment for research on MCP tool recommendations. Building on this dataset, we propose T2MRec, a task-to-MCP server recommendation model. It models semantic relevance and structural compatibility to construct an initial candidate set. Then it improves coverage and ranking quality through centroid-based candidate expansion and constrained LLM-based re-ranking. In addition, we design and implement an interactive MCP server recommendation agent prototype that operates in conversational environments to support dynamic decision-making. The agent assists developers in efficiently evaluating and integrating tools by providing recommended MCP servers together with usage guidelines.

</details>


### [507] [A Pilot Study on Detecting Software Design Patterns with Large Language Models: An Empirical Evaluation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.17329)
*Oishik Chowdhury,Bastin Tony Roy Savarimuthu,Sherlock A. Licorish*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: 评估四种大型语言模型和两种集成方法在设计模式检测中的表现，比较源代码、PlantUML表示和文本描述三种输入方式的效果


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 设计模式检测能帮助开发者理解软件架构和识别质量问题，但现有基于图或机器学习的方法有限，需要探索LLM在这方面的潜力

Method: 使用四种LLM和两种集成方法（三种模型组合），在三种不同输入形式（源代码、PlantUML表示、文本描述）下检测五种设计模式（单例、适配器、桥接、组合、装饰器）

Result: LLM在设计模式检测方面表现出潜力，NextCoder和Gemma 3模型准确率相对较高，集成方法能提升整体检测效率

Conclusion: LLM可用于自动检测设计模式，不同模型和输入形式影响检测效果，集成方法能提升性能，未来需要进一步研究

Abstract: Design patterns provide reusable solutions to recurring software design problems. Automatically detecting these patterns in source code can help bootstrap new developers' understanding of unfamiliar software system architectures, and can help experienced developers to quickly identify and rectify potential quality issues. While many prior research works have explored graph based and machine-learning based detection techniques, this work evaluates the design pattern recognition capabilities of four Large Language Models and two ensemble approaches consisting three out of the four models. We also compare their performance when prompted with a) Source code, b) PlantUML representation of source code, and c) Text-based descriptions of the source code. We investigate the detection of five design patterns: singleton, adapter, bridge, composite and decorator. Our preliminary results indicate that LLMs show promise for automatically detecting design patterns, with NextCoder and Gemma 3 demonstrating comparatively higher accuracy than other models evaluated, and the ensemble approaches enhancing the overall efficiency of design pattern detection. We identify several directions for future work.

</details>


### [508] [Precise Debugging Benchmark: Is Your Model Debugging or Regenerating?](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.17338)
*Wang Bill Zhu,Miaosen Chai,Shangshang Wang,Yejia Liu,Song Bian,Honghua Dong,Willie Neiswanger,Robin Jia*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: 论文提出了PDB框架，将编码数据集自动转换为调试基准，通过合成原子bug并组合成多bug程序来评估LLM的精确调试能力，发现前沿模型虽然单元测试通过率高但编辑精度低。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有LLM在调试时经常过度编辑，生成正确但非精确的解决方案。需要评估LLM与精确调试之间的差距，理解模型在定位故障和针对性编辑方面的能力。

Method: 提出PDB框架，自动将任何编码数据集转换为调试基准。通过合成已验证的原子bug并组合成多bug程序。定义两个新指标：编辑级精度（衡量必要编辑的比例）和bug级召回率（衡量解决的bug数量）。

Result: 前沿模型如GPT-5.1-Codex和DeepSeek-V3.2-Thinking在单元测试通过率上超过76%，但编辑精度低于45%。迭代和代理调试策略对精度和召回率没有显著改善。

Conclusion: LLM在精确调试方面仍有很大差距，需要重新思考编码模型的后训练流程，以提高定位故障和针对性编辑的能力。

Abstract: Unlike code completion, debugging requires localizing faults and applying targeted edits. We observe that frontier LLMs often regenerate correct but over-edited solutions during debugging. To evaluate how far LLMs are from precise debugging, we introduce the Precise Debugging Benchmark (PDB) framework, which automatically converts any coding dataset into a debugging benchmark with precision-aware evaluation. PDB generates buggy programs by synthesizing verified atomic bugs and composing them into multi-bug programs. We define two novel metrics, edit-level precision and bug-level recall, which measures how many necessary edits are made and how many bugs are resolved. We release two evaluation benchmarks: PDB-Single-Hard on single-line bugs, and PDB-Multi on multi-line bugs. Experiments show that frontier models, such as GPT-5.1-Codex and DeepSeek-V3.2-Thinking, achieve unit-test pass rates above 76% but exhibit precision below 45%, even when explicitly instructed to perform minimal debugging. Finally, we show that iterative and agentic debugging strategies do not substantially improve precision or recall, highlighting the need to rethink post-training pipelines for coding models.

</details>


### [509] [RISC-V Functional Safety for Autonomous Automotive Systems: An Analytical Framework and Research Roadmap for ML-Assisted Certification](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.17391)
*Nick Andreasyan,Mikhail Struve,Alexey Popov,Maksim Nikolaev,Vadim Vashkelis*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: 论文分析了RISC-V在汽车功能安全中的作用，强调认证经济性而非处理器性能是主要优化目标，提出了支持认证工作流程的分析框架和研究路线图。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: RISC-V已通过ISO 26262 ASIL-D认证，可用于自动驾驶系统，但汽车功能安全的核心挑战在于认证过程的高昂成本，包括诊断覆盖率分析、工具链认证、故障注入等，而非处理器本身的问题。

Method: 分析RISC-V在汽车功能安全中的角色，包括ISA开放性、形式可验证性、自定义扩展控制等特性；研究自动驾驶安全需求与RISC-V架构挑战的映射；提出以认证经济性为优化目标的分析框架和研究路线图；探讨ML方法（如LLM辅助FMEDA生成、知识图谱安全案例自动化等）如何支持认证工作流程。

Result: 论文认为RISC-V在汽车功能安全中的最大价值不在于更快的核心，而在于提供ASIL-D就绪的可认证平台；通过开放ISA、形式验证等特性可降低认证成本；ML方法可自动化部分认证流程，进一步优化认证经济性。

Conclusion: 汽车功能安全本质上是认证问题而非处理器问题，RISC-V的成功关键在于能否提供经济高效的可认证平台；认证经济性应成为主要优化目标，ML技术可支持认证工作流程自动化，最终目标是实现ASIL-D就绪的可认证RISC-V平台。

Abstract: RISC-V is emerging as a viable platform for automotive-grade embedded computing, with recent ISO 26262 ASIL-D certifications demonstrating readiness for safety-critical deployment in autonomous driving systems. However, functional safety in automotive systems is fundamentally a certification problem rather than a processor problem. The dominant costs arise from diagnostic coverage analysis, toolchain qualification, fault injection campaigns, safety-case generation, and compliance with ISO 26262, ISO 21448 (SOTIF), and ISO/SAE 21434.
  This paper analyzes the role of RISC-V in automotive functional safety, focusing on ISA openness, formal verifiability, custom extension control, debug transparency, and vendor-independent qualification. We examine autonomous driving safety requirements and map them to RISC-V architectural challenges such as lockstep execution, safety islands, mixed-criticality isolation, and secure debug.
  Rather than proposing a single algorithmic breakthrough, we present an analytical framework and research roadmap centered on certification economics as the primary optimization objective. We also discuss how selected ML methods, including LLM-assisted FMEDA generation, knowledge-graph-based safety case automation, reinforcement learning for fault injection, and graph neural networks for diagnostic coverage, can support certification workflows. We argue that the strongest outcome is not a faster core, but an ASIL-D-ready certifiable RISC-V platform.

</details>


### [510] [Project resilience as network robustness](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.17417)
*Sebastiano A. Piccolo,Giorgio Terracina*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: 提出基于网络鲁棒性的新方法来评估工程项目对关键人员流失的脆弱性，相比现有方法提供更准确、一致的韧性评估。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 工程项目中工作量分布不均，少数关键人员承担大量任务并促进项目整合，这种依赖关系可能导致严重的经济损失和延误。现有风险评估方法存在缺陷：有的过于乐观（最佳情况估计），有的未能捕捉项目碎片化导致估计偏差。

Method: 开发了一种新颖的方法，从网络鲁棒性的视角评估项目脆弱性。通过将项目成员和任务建模为网络，分析关键人员流失对项目整体结构的影响。

Result: 与现有替代方法相比，该方法提供了更好、更一致的项目对人员流失的韧性估计，能够更准确地评估项目脆弱性。

Conclusion: 基于网络鲁棒性的方法能够更有效地评估工程项目对关键人员流失的脆弱性，为项目风险管理提供了更可靠的工具。

Abstract: Engineering projects are the result of the combined effort of their members. Yet, it has been documented that labor division withing projects is unevenly distributed: some project members are specialists undertaking only few tasks, whereas other are generalists and are responsible for the success of many tasks. Moreover, the latter are often facilitators of project integration. Such a workload distribution prompts one question: how resilient is a project to key personnel loss? Far from being a theoretical problem, the reliance of a project on a few key people can lead to severe economic losses and delays. We argue that current methods to estimate such a risk are unsatisfactory: some methods offer a best-case estimate and are, therefore, too optimistic; other methods fail to capture project fragmentation leading to biased estimates and unrealistic consequences in many settings. In this paper, we develop a novel method to assess project vulnerability by looking at it from the lens of network robustness. We compare our method against existing alternatives and show that it offers better and more consistent estimates of project resilience to personnel loss.

</details>


### [511] [Project Prometheus: Bridging the Intent Gap in Agentic Program Repair via Reverse-Engineered Executable Specifications](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.17464)
*Yongchao Wang,Zhiqiu Huang*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: Prometheus框架通过规范推断而非代码生成来解决APR中的意图差距问题，使用BDD作为可执行契约，通过RQA循环验证推断的规范，在Defects4J基准上达到93.97%的正确修复率。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有APR代理存在"意图差距"问题，即生成的补丁与开发者原始意图不匹配。当前基于自然语言摘要或对抗采样的解决方案无法提供确定性约束，导致无法进行精确修复。

Method: 提出Prometheus框架，优先进行规范推断而非代码生成。采用行为驱动开发(BDD)作为可执行契约，使用多智能体架构从运行时失败报告中逆向工程Gherkin规范。为解决"意图幻觉"问题，提出需求质量保证(RQA)循环，利用真实代码作为代理预言机验证推断的规范。

Result: 在Defects4J基准的680个缺陷上评估，总正确修复率达到93.97%(639/680)。救援率达到74.4%，成功修复了119个强盲代理无法解决的复杂bug。定性分析显示显式意图引导代理远离结构侵入性的过度工程，转向精确的最小化修正。

Conclusion: APR的未来不在于更大的模型，而在于将代码与已验证的可执行规范对齐的能力——无论是预先存在的还是逆向工程的。Prometheus通过规范推断有效解决了意图差距问题。

Abstract: The transition from neural machine translation to agentic workflows has revolutionized Automated Program Repair (APR). However, existing agents, despite their advanced reasoning capabilities, frequently suffer from the ``Intent Gap'' -- the misalignment between the generated patch and the developer's original intent. Current solutions relying on natural language summaries or adversarial sampling often fail to provide the deterministic constraints required for surgical repairs.
  In this paper, we introduce \textsc{Prometheus}, a novel framework that bridges this gap by prioritizing \textit{Specification Inference} over code generation. We employ Behavior-Driven Development (BDD) as an executable contract, utilizing a multi-agent architecture to reverse-engineer Gherkin specifications from runtime failure reports. To resolve the ``Hallucination of Intent,'' we propose a \textbf{Requirement Quality Assurance (RQA) Loop}, a mechanism that leverages ground-truth code as a proxy oracle to validate inferred specifications.
  We evaluated \textsc{Prometheus} on 680 defects from the Defects4J benchmark. The results are transformative: our framework achieved a total correct patch rate of \textbf{93.97\%} (639/680). More significantly, it demonstrated a \textbf{Rescue Rate of 74.4\%}, successfully repairing 119 complex bugs that a strong blind agent failed to resolve. Qualitative analysis reveals that explicit intent guides agents away from structurally invasive over-engineering toward precise, minimal corrections. Our findings suggest that the future of APR lies not in larger models, but in the capability to align code with verified, \textbf{Executable Specifications} -- whether pre-existing or reverse-engineered.

</details>


### [512] [Technology Research Software: An Often Overlooked Category of Research Software](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.17506)
*Wilhelm Hasselbring,Daniel S. Katz,Rob van Nieuwpoort*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: 本文提出了"技术研究软件"这一新的研究软件分类，探讨其在研究过程中的角色，并引入技术就绪水平来评估其成熟度。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 技术研究软件作为研究软件的一个新类别，在软件工程社区中经常被忽视和忽略。本文旨在阐明这一类别，使其得到应有的认识和重视。

Method: 通过解释技术研究软件的概念及其主要子角色，并引入技术就绪水平作为评估软件成熟度的方法，定义了技术研究软件的次级子角色。通过具体案例说明软件在不同研究场景中可能同时扮演技术研究软件和其他研究软件类别的角色。

Result: 明确了技术研究软件的定义、主要子角色和基于技术就绪水平的次级子角色分类，并通过实例使这一概念更加具体化。

Conclusion: 技术研究软件是研究软件分类中一个重要的新维度，需要得到研究软件工程社区的更多关注。通过技术就绪水平可以更好地评估其成熟度，而同一软件在不同使用场景中可能扮演多重角色。

Abstract: Research software has been categorized for various goals. One fundamental dimension of such categorizations is the role that the software plays in the research process. Recently, a new role category has emerged: technology research software, which covers research software developed in technology research. Until now, this category of technology research software has often been overlooked and neglected within the research software engineering community. In this article, we explain technology research software and its primary subroles. Technology readiness levels are an established method of estimating the maturity of technologies, including software systems. For technology research software, these readiness levels define secondary subroles. To illustrate the concept of technology research software and to make it more tangible, we present examples of research software that, depending on its specific use within or outside of research, take on the role of technology research software as well as that of another research software category.

</details>


### [513] [Augmenting unit test suites from integration tests](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.17508)
*Katerina Paltoglou,Vassilis E. Zafeiris*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: 提出一种结合静态与动态分析的方法，用于自动生成单元测试来增强测试套件，特别适用于集成测试和系统测试占主导的"倒金字塔"结构项目。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 许多项目的测试结构不符合推荐的测试金字塔模型（单元测试为基础，集成测试居中，系统测试最少），而是集成和系统测试占多数，导致测试粒度粗、故障定位困难、执行时间长。

Method: 利用集成测试（测试组件及其依赖）通过静态和动态分析自动生成单元测试，使组件依赖能够在隔离环境中验证。

Result: 在Node.js平台上实现研究原型，并在12个开源JS应用中进行评估，结果支持该方法的有效性和实用性。

Conclusion: 该方法能有效改善测试结构，将粗粒度的集成测试转化为细粒度的单元测试，提高测试效率和故障定位能力，且可移植到其他语言和平台。

Abstract: We propose a method that employs static and dynamic analysis for augmenting a test suite with automatically generated unit tests. The method is most suitable for test suites where the stratification of unit, integration and system tests does not conform to the recommended test pyramid structure: numerous unit tests providing high code coverage and forming the base, fewer integration tests in the middle that verify component collaboration, and far fewer system or UI tests at the top that exercise acceptance or other scenarios of use. Instead, integration and system tests represent the majority of test cases, resulting in coarse-grained tests with limited fault localization and longer execution times. The method leverages integration tests, exercising a component and its dependencies, to generate unit tests that verify component dependencies in isolation. We showcase and empirically evaluate the proposed method in the Node.js platform, although it can be ported and adapted to other languages and platforms. The evaluation is based on a research prototype implemented as a Node.js tool and is conducted in the context of twelve open source JS applications (benchmark projects). Evaluation results support the effectiveness and practicality of our approach.

</details>


### [514] [Isolating Recurring Execution-Dependent Abnormal Patterns on NISQ Quantum Devices](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.17519)
*Zhenyu Qi,Qian Zhang,Haotang Li,Sen He,Jiyuan Wang*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: QRisk框架通过发现硬件特定的异常模式来改进量子编译，使用delta调试隔离产生额外误差的电路片段，并通过交换对易门来破坏这些模式，显著降低硬件噪声。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有量子编译器依赖校准噪声模型，但这些模型无法捕捉上下文相关的效应（如串扰、相关调度误差），导致两个在噪声模型下评分相同的编译电路在实际硬件上表现差异很大，编译器无法从这种不匹配中学习。

Method: QRisk使用delta调试从实际硬件执行中隔离出持续产生额外误差的紧凑电路片段，验证其在多次运行和校准窗口中的持续性，建立后端特定模式数据库。编译时扫描电路寻找已知模式，应用对易门交换来破坏这些模式。

Result: 在两个IBM后端（ibm_fez和ibm_marrakesh）上评估，发现的模式在数月内跨多个校准窗口持续存在。破坏这些模式可将额外硬件噪声降低24%（ibm_fez）和45%（ibm_marrakesh），而噪声模型预测所有等效电路误差相同。第三个后端测试确认这些模式是后端特定的。

Conclusion: QRisk能够发现并缓解量子硬件特定的异常误差模式，显著改善编译电路的实际性能，而传统噪声模型无法捕捉这些效应，为量子编译提供了新的优化维度。

Abstract: Quantum compilers rely on calibration-derived noise models to guide circuit mapping and optimization. These models characterize gate and qubit errors independently and miss context-dependent effects such as crosstalk and correlated scheduling errors. As a result, two compiled circuits that score equally under the noise model can behave very differently on real hardware, and the compiler has no mechanism to learn from such recurring mismatches.
  We present QRisk, a framework that discovers backend-specific abnormal patterns from real hardware executions. QRisk uses delta debugging to isolate compact circuit fragments that consistently produce excess error not predicted by the noise model, then validates their persistence across repeated runs and calibration windows. The verified patterns are stored in a backend-specific pattern database. At compilation time, QRisk scans a compiled circuit for occurrences of known patterns and applies targeted commuting gate swaps to disrupt them, producing a semantically equivalent circuit with fewer abnormal patterns.
  We evaluate QRisk on two IBM backends (ibm_fez and ibm_marrakesh) using Grover search circuits. On both backends, discovered patterns persist across multiple calibration windows over months. Disrupting these patterns via commuting gate swaps reduces excess hardware noise by 24% on ibm_fez (Spearman $ρ$ = 0.515, p = 0.0007) and 45% on ibm_marrakesh ($ρ$ = 0.711, p < 0.0001), while the noise model predicts identical error for all equivalent circuits. Testing on a third backend confirms that these patterns are backend-specific.

</details>


### [515] [Single-Language Evidence Is Insufficient for Automated Logging: A Multilingual Benchmark and Empirical Study with LLMs](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.17529)
*Renyi Zhong,Yichen Li,Yulun Wu,Jinxi Kuang,Yintong Huo,Michael R. Lyu*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: MultiLogBench是一个多语言日志生成基准测试，包含6种编程语言的63,965个代码实例，用于评估LLM在日志生成各环节的性能，发现跨语言差异显著，需要多语言评估来获得可靠结论。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有自动化日志研究主要基于Java语言的仓库快照数据集，不清楚结论是否适用于其他编程语言生态系统或真实的代码演进过程。需要建立一个多语言基准来验证模型行为的普适性。

Method: 创建MultiLogBench基准，包含6种编程语言的63,965个生产代码仓库快照实例、744个开发者在维护中引入日志的修订历史案例，以及用于鲁棒性分析的配对转换修订历史分支。使用7个当代大语言模型在统一协议下评估日志位置定位、框架锚点匹配、严重性预测、消息生成、变量恢复和级联整体质量。

Result: 结果显示明显的跨语言差异：框架锚点匹配是最语言敏感的组件，循环和嵌套可调用站点是最难的结构上下文，模型排名仅在顶级保持稳定。这些模式在修订历史数据上大致保持，转换输入不会导致广泛的同向性能崩溃。

Conclusion: 关于自动化日志的稳健主张需要多语言评估和维护导向的验证。MultiLogBench展示了跨语言评估的重要性，以及在实际代码演进场景中验证模型性能的必要性。

Abstract: Logging statements are central to debugging, failure diagnosis, and production observability, yet writing them requires developers to decide where to place a logging statement, which API and severity level to use, and what runtime information to expose. Automated logging aims to reduce this burden, but existing evidence remains dominated by Java-centric repository-snapshot dataset. It is therefore unclear whether conclusions about model behavior and model selection generalize across programming-language ecosystems or realistic code evolution. This paper presents MultiLogBench, a multilingual benchmark and empirical study spanning six programming language ecosystems. MultiLogBench contains 63,965 production-code repository-snapshot instances, 744 revision-history cases where developers introduce logging statements during maintenance, and a paired transformed revision-history branch for robustness analysis. Using seven contemporary large language models under a unified protocol, we evaluate logging-site localization, framework-anchor matching, severity prediction, message generation, variable recovery, and cascaded overall quality. Results show clear cross-language variation: framework-anchor matching is the most language-sensitive component, loop and nested-callable sites are the hardest structural contexts, and model rankings are stable only at the top tier. These patterns persist at a coarse level on revision-history data, while transformed inputs do not cause a broad same-direction performance collapse. Overall, MultiLogBench shows that robust claims about automated logging require multilingual evaluation and maintenance-oriented validation.

</details>


### [516] [AIRA: AI-Induced Risk Audit: A Structured Inspection Framework for AI-Generated Code](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.17587)
*William M. Parris*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: 研究发现AI生成的代码存在"静默失败"模式，即代码表面正常但隐藏了功能缺陷，这可能是人类反馈优化的结果而非随机bug分布。作者提出AIRA检测框架，发现AI生成代码的高严重性缺陷是人工代码的1.8倍。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 从业者观察到AI辅助代码生成存在方向性模式：AI生成的代码倾向于"静默失败"，保持功能外观但降低或隐藏保证。这可能反映了人类反馈优化的产物而非随机bug分布。

Method: 提出"失败真实性"概念，开发AIRA（AI诱导风险审计）框架，包含15项确定性检查。进行三项研究：企业环境审计、600文件公共语料库试点、955个AI生成文件与955个人工控制文件的严格匹配对照实验。

Result: 在最终复制实验中，AI生成文件每文件0.435个高严重性发现，人工控制文件0.242个（1.8倍）。效果在JavaScript、Python和TypeScript中一致，在异常处理相关模式中最为集中。

Conclusion: 研究结果支持AI辅助代码存在向"软失败"行为倾斜的方向性偏差。AIRA框架适用于需要"封闭失败"行为的治理、合规和安全关键系统。

Abstract: Practitioners have reported a directional pattern in AI-assisted code generation: AI-generated code tends to fail quietly, preserving the appearance of functionality while degrading or concealing guarantees. This paper introduces the Reward-Shaped Failure Hypothesis - the proposal that this pattern may reflect an artifact of optimization through human feedback rather than a random distribution of bugs. We define failure truthfulness as the property that a system's observable outputs accurately represent its internal success or failure state. We then present AIRA (AI-Induced Risk Audit), a deterministic 15-check inspection framework designed to detect failure-untruthful patterns in code. We report results from three studies: (1) an anonymized enterprise environment audit, (2) a balanced 600-file public corpus pilot, and (3) a strict matched-control replication comparing 955 AI-attributed files against 955 human-control files. In the final replication, AI-attributed files show 0.435 high-severity findings per file versus 0.242 in human controls (1.80x). The effect is consistent across JavaScript, Python, and TypeScript, with strongest concentration in exception-handling-related patterns. These findings are consistent with a directional skew toward fail-soft behavior in AI-assisted code. AIRA is designed for governance, compliance, and safety-critical systems where fail-closed behavior is required.

</details>


### [517] [Beyond the YAML File: Understanding Real-World GitHub Actions Workflow Adoption](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.17662)
*Ali Khatami,Carolin Brandt,Andy Zaidman*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: 分析GitHub Actions工作流的真实执行记录，研究开发者对工作流失败的反应模式、工作流使用情况及其与项目特征的关系


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: GitHub Actions已成为现代软件开发中主流的自动化平台，但缺乏对其实际使用情况、开发者对工作流失败的反应模式以及这些模式与项目特征关系的系统性研究

Method: 定量分析258,300个工作流运行记录（来自952个仓库），并对21个选定的多样化GitHub仓库进行深入的定性分析，了解维护者和贡献者如何与工作流结果互动

Result: 识别出三种不同的失败响应模式；观察到GHA工作流使用强度越高，失败率越低；发现配置-使用差距（配置文件存在但工作流被禁用或未使用）；定性分析得出五个待验证的假设

Conclusion: 研究揭示了GitHub Actions工作流的实际使用模式、开发者行为特征以及配置与实践之间的差距，为未来改进CI/CD实践提供了实证基础

Abstract: Continuous Integration and Continuous Deployment (CI/CD) have become fundamental to modern software development, with GitHub Actions (GHA) emerging as a dominant automation platform. In this study, we analyze real-world execution records of GHA, examining how developers react to workflow failures, how these workflows are utilized by projects, and how these aspects relate to project characteristics. We quantitatively analyze 258,300 workflow run records from 952 repositories and perform an in-depth qualitative analysis of 21 selected, diverse GitHub repositories to understand how maintainers and contributors interact with workflow results. We identify three distinct failure response patterns, observe that higher usage intensity of GHA workflows correlates with lower failure rates, and uncover a configuration-usage gap where the presence of configuration files masks disabled or unused workflows. Moreover, our qualitative analysis of relationships between project characteristics and utilization patterns yields five hypotheses for future validation.

</details>


### [518] [SelfHeal: Empirical Fix Pattern Analysis and Bug Repair in LLM Agents](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.17699)
*Niful Islam,Muhammad Anas Raza,Mohammad Wardat*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: 论文提出了首个关于LLM代理bug修复模式的实证研究，创建了AgentDefect基准数据集，并开发了SelfHeal多代理系统来自动修复LLM代理中的bug。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 随着LLM代理在软件开发中的广泛应用，开发者面临调试这些复杂系统的挑战。目前缺乏对LLM代理bug修复模式的系统研究，也没有专门的基准数据集和自动化修复工具。

Method: 1) 从Stack Overflow、GitHub和HuggingFace Forums收集bug报告和代码片段进行实证分析；2) 创建包含37个运行时bug实例的AgentDefect基准数据集；3) 设计SelfHeal多代理系统，使用两个独立的ReAct代理（修复代理和批评代理），结合内部知识（修复规则）和外部知识（网络搜索）来提议和验证修复。

Result: 1) 完成了对LLM代理bug修复模式的首次系统分析；2) 建立了首个LLM代理bug基准数据集；3) SelfHeal系统在使用Gemini 3 Pro作为骨干LLM时，显著优于基线和最先进方法。

Conclusion: 该研究填补了LLM代理调试领域的空白，提供了系统性的bug分析、基准数据集和有效的自动化修复工具，为LLM代理的可靠性和可维护性提供了重要支持。

Abstract: Large Language Models (LLMs) have transformed software development and AI applications. While LLMs are designed for text processing, LLM agents extend this capability by enabling autonomous actions, tool use, and multi-step task completion. As this field grows, developers face new challenges in debugging these complex systems. To address this challenge, we present the first empirical study on bug fix patterns in LLM agents. We study buggy posts and code snippets from three platforms: Stack Overflow, GitHub, and HuggingFace Forums. We examine their fix patterns, the components where fixes are applied, and the programming languages and frameworks involved. Furthermore, we introduce AgentDefect, the first benchmark dataset for bugs in LLM agents. The dataset contains 37 runtime buggy instances along with fixed code and test files. Finally, we present SelfHeal, a multi-agent system designed to fix bugs in LLM agents. The system leverages two independent ReAct agents: the fix agent and the critic agent. These agents use tools that provide both internal knowledge (fix rules) and external knowledge (web search) to propose and validate fixes. Our evaluation shows that SelfHeal with Gemini 3 Pro as the backbone LLM outperforms both baseline and state-of-the-art approaches by a significant margin.

</details>


### [519] [Program Structure-aware Language Models: Targeted Software Testing beyond Textual Semantics](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.17715)
*Khang Tran,Khoa Nguyen,Cristian Borcea,NhatHai Phan*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: GLMTest是首个结合程序结构感知的LLM测试用例生成框架，通过代码属性图和代码语义的融合，实现针对特定执行分支的可控测试生成，显著提升分支准确率。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有基于大语言模型的测试用例生成方法虽然通过提示工程提升了分支覆盖率，但缺乏引导模型针对高风险执行分支的机制，限制了发现细微bug和安全漏洞的能力。

Method: 提出GLMTest框架，将代码属性图与代码语义相结合，使用图神经网络和语言模型，使测试用例生成能够以执行分支为条件，实现结构化条件控制。

Result: 在真实项目实验中，基于Qwen2.5-Coder-7B-Instruct的GLMTest在TestGenEval基准测试中将分支准确率从27.4%提升至50.2%，优于Claude-Sonnet-4.5和GPT-4o-mini等SOTA模型。

Conclusion: GLMTest通过程序结构感知的针对性测试生成，为发现bug和安全漏洞提供了更有效的可控方法，显著提升了测试用例生成的质量和针对性。

Abstract: Recent advances in large language models for test case generation have improved branch coverage via prompt-engineered mutations. However, they still lack principled mechanisms for steering models toward specific high-risk execution branches, limiting their effectiveness for discovering subtle bugs and security vulnerabilities. We propose GLMTest, the first program structure-aware LLM framework for targeted test case generation that seamlessly integrates code property graphs and code semantics using a graph neural network and a language model to condition test case generation on execution branches. This structured conditioning enables controllable and branch-targeted test case generation, thereby potentially enhancing bug and security risk discovery. Experiments on real-world projects show that GLMTest built on a Qwen2.5-Coder-7B-Instruct model improves branch accuracy from 27.4% to 50.2% on TestGenEval benchmark compared with state-of-the-art LLMs, i.e., Claude-Sonnet-4.5 and GPT-4o-mini.

</details>


### [520] [Revisiting Code Debloating with Ground Truth-based Evaluation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.17717)
*Muhammad Bilal,Moiz Ali,Mohit Kumar,Fareed Zaffar,Fahad Shaon,Ashish Gehani,Sazzadur Rahaman*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: 本文通过基于真实基准的评估范式重新审视应用级去冗余技术，分析八种先进工具，发现动态分析工具可能移除94%应保留的代码，而静态分析工具则存在高误保留率，两者都会导致功能错误和安全隐患。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 应用级去冗余技术虽然旨在减少性能开销、攻击面和维护成本，但当前评估方法依赖不完善的代理指标（如测试用例驱动的正确性评估、代码大小衡量运行时效率、gadget计数评估安全性），缺乏标准化方法论和基准来真实评估其性能。

Method: 采用基于真实基准的评估范式，对八种最先进的去冗余工具（Blade、Chisel、Cov、CovA、Lmcas、Trimmer、Occam、Razor）进行全面分析，这些工具涵盖了源到源、IR到IR、二进制到二进制三种转换范式，实现了跨抽象层次的整体评估。

Result: 动态分析工具可能移除高达94%应保留的代码，而静态分析工具则表现出相反行为，由于粗粒度依赖过度近似导致高误保留率。静态分析还可能通过引入函数特化变体而增加代码。误保留和误移除不仅导致功能不正确，还可能引发系统性不一致、鲁棒性失败和可利用漏洞。

Conclusion: 应用级去冗余技术当前存在严重缺陷，需要更严谨的评估方法和标准化基准。动态分析和静态分析各有明显不足，误代码处理会带来功能和安全风险，社区需要建立更可靠的评估体系来推动该领域发展。

Abstract: Program debloating aims to remove unused code to reduce performance overhead, attack surfaces, and maintenance costs. Over time, debloating has evolved across multiple layers (container, library, and application), each building on the principles of application-level debloating. Despite its central role, application-level debloating continues to rely on imperfect proxies for measuring performance, such as test-case-driven evaluation for correctness, code size for runtime efficiency, and gadget count reduction for estimating security posture. While there is widespread skepticism about using such imperfect proxies, the community still lacks standardized methodologies or benchmarks to assess the true performance of application-level software debloating. This experience paper aims to address the gap.
  We revisit the foundations of application-level debloating through a ground-truth-based evaluation paradigm. Our analysis of eight state-of-the-art debloaters - Blade, Chisel, Cov, CovA, Lmcas, Trimmer, Occam, and Razor - uncovers insights previously unattainable through traditional evaluations. These tools collectively span the spectrum of source-to-source, IR-to-IR, and binary-to-binary transformation paradigms, characterizing a holistic reassessment across abstraction levels. Our analysis reveals that while dynamic analysis-based tools often remove up to 94% of code that should be retained, static analysis-based approaches exhibit the opposite behavior, showing high false retention rates due to coarse-grained dependency over-approximation. Additionally, static analyses may add code by introducing specialized variants of functions. False retentions and removals not only cause functional incorrectness but may also lead to systematic inconsistency, robustness failures, and exploitable vulnerabilities.

</details>


### [521] [Raven: Rethinking Automated Assessment for Scratch Programs via Video-Grounded Evaluation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.17820)
*Donglin Li,Daming Li,Hanyuan Shi,Jialu Zhang*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: Raven是一个用于Scratch编程的自动评估框架，它使用任务级视频生成规则和LLM结合视频分析来评估学生程序，无需特定测试用例，显著提升了评估准确性和可扩展性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: Scratch等基于块的编程环境在入门计算教育中广泛使用，但可扩展且可靠的自动评估仍然难以实现。Scratch程序具有高度异构性、事件驱动性和视觉基础性，使得传统的基于断言或测试的评分方法脆弱且难以扩展。因此，实际Scratch课堂中的评估仍然严重依赖人工检查和延迟反馈，导致教师间不一致并限制了可扩展性。

Method: Raven采用任务级视频生成规则替代程序特定状态断言，这些规则在所有学生提交中共享。该框架将大型语言模型与视频分析相结合，评估程序观察到的视觉和交互行为是否满足评分标准，无需显式测试用例或预定义输出。这种设计使得在实现策略和交互序列存在显著多样性的情况下仍能保持一致的评估。

Result: 在包含140多个学生提交的13个真实Scratch作业上评估Raven，结果显示Raven在评分准确性和对不同编程风格的鲁棒性方面显著优于先前的自动评估工具。一项包含30名学生和10名教师的课堂研究进一步展示了强大的用户接受度和实际适用性。

Conclusion: 这些发现共同突出了任务级行为抽象在开放、事件驱动程序的可扩展评估中的有效性。Raven框架为解决Scratch编程环境中的自动评估挑战提供了一种创新且实用的解决方案。

Abstract: Block-based programming environments such as Scratch are widely used in introductory computing education, yet scalable and reliable automated assessment remains elusive. Scratch programs are highly heterogeneous, event-driven, and visually grounded, which makes traditional assertion-based or test-based grading brittle and difficult to scale. As a result, assessment in real Scratch classrooms still relies heavily on manual inspection and delayed feedback, introducing inconsistency across instructors and limiting scalability.
  We present Raven, an automated assessment framework for Scratch that replaces program-specific state assertions with instructor-specified, task-level video generation rules shared across all student submissions. Raven integrates large language models with video analysis to evaluate whether a program's observed visual and interactive behaviors satisfy grading criteria, without requiring explicit test cases or predefined outputs. This design enables consistent evaluation despite substantial diversity in implementation strategies and interaction sequences.
  We evaluate Raven on 13 real Scratch assignments comprising over 140 student submissions with ground-truth labels from human graders. The results show that Raven significantly outperforms prior automated assessment tools in both grading accuracy and robustness across diverse programming styles. A classroom study with 30 students and 10 instructors further demonstrates strong user acceptance and practical applicability. Together, these findings highlight the effectiveness of task-level behavioral abstractions for scalable assessment of open-ended, event-driven programs.

</details>


### [522] [Scaling Human-AI Coding Collaboration Requires a Governable Consensus Layer](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.17883)
*Tianfu Wang,Zhezheng Hao,Yin Wu,Wei Wu,Qiang Lin,Hande Dong,Nicholas Jing Yuan,Hui Xiong*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: 提出Agentic Consensus范式，用类型化属性图表示的共识层C取代代码作为主要工程产物，通过同步操作符实现可执行产物的对应，使所有承诺可审计


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前AI辅助开发的主要产物（代码+聊天历史）存在维度塌陷问题，将复杂系统拓扑扁平化为低维文本，导致系统在变更时变得不透明和脆弱，缺乏结构承诺、依赖关系和证据的记录

Method: 提出Agentic Consensus范式：1) 共识层C作为可操作的世界模型，以类型化属性图表示；2) 可执行产物从C派生并通过同步操作符Φ（实现）和Ψ（再水合）保持对应；3) 证据直接链接到C中的结构声明

Result: 理论框架提出，尚未有实证结果。但提出了评估方向：从代码正确性转向对齐保真度、共识熵和干预距离的评估，并设计了基准任务族来测量共识工作流相比聊天驱动基线的干预减少

Conclusion: 需要范式转变，从生成代码转向维护可审计的共识层，使所有结构承诺显式化、可追踪，将未明确说明的部分量化为可测量的共识熵而非无声猜测，从而提高系统在变更时的透明度和韧性

Abstract: Vibe coding produces correct, executable code at speed, but leaves no record of the structural commitments, dependencies, or evidence behind it. Reviewers cannot determine what invariants were assumed, what changed, or why a regression occurred. This is not a generation failure but a control failure: the dominant artifact of AI-assisted development (code plus chat history) performs dimension collapse, flattening complex system topology into low-dimensional text and making systems opaque and fragile under change. We propose Agentic Consensus: a paradigm in which the consensus layer C, an operable world model represented as a typed property graph, replaces code as the primary artifact of engineering. Executable artifacts are derived from C and kept in correspondence via synchronization operators Phi (realize) and Psi (rehydrate). Evidence links directly to structural claims in C, making every commitment auditable and under-specification explicit as measurable consensus entropy rather than a silent guess. Evaluation must move beyond code correctness toward alignment fidelity, consensus entropy, and intervention distance. We propose benchmark task families designed to measure whether consensus-based workflows reduce human intervention compared to chat-driven baselines.

</details>


### [523] [Cache-Related Smells in GitLab CI/CD: Comprehensive Catalog, Automated Detection, and Empirical Evidence](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.17890)
*Francesco Urdih,Theodoros Theodoropoulos,Uwe Zdun*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: 本文提出GitLab CI/CD中10种缓存相关异味，开发了自动检测工具CROSSER，并在开源项目中验证了这些异味的普遍存在。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: CI/CD需要快速反馈和最小化停机时间，缓存是提升管道性能和可靠性的有效技术。现有研究主要关注缺失依赖缓存，忽略了其他缓存类型和缓存配置错误。

Method: 1) 基于灰色文献验证，构建了10种缓存相关异味的全面分类；2) 开发了自动检测工具CROSSER，能检测其中7种异味；3) 在82个成熟项目的手动标注数据集上评估CROSSER；4) 在228个成熟开源项目中调查异味的普遍性。

Result: CROSSER在评估数据集上达到总体F1分数0.98。在228个项目中，只有11%的项目没有发现任何缓存异味，表明这些异味普遍存在。研究还发现开发者可能不了解高级缓存功能。

Conclusion: 缓存相关异味在GitLab CI/CD中普遍存在，对性能和可靠性有负面影响。CROSSER工具能有效检测这些异味，帮助开发者改进缓存配置。

Abstract: Continuous Integration and Deployment (CI/CD) facilitate rapid software delivery, making fast feedback and minimal downtime essential. While caching has been shown to be an effective technique for tackling pipeline performance and reliability issues, existing works have primarily focused on missing dependency caches, ignoring other types of caches and cache misconfigurations. In this paper, we present a comprehensive catalog of ten cache-related smells in GitLab CI/CD that negatively impact performance and reliability, validated on a corpus of grey literature. To address the smells, we propose CROSSER, a tool that automatically detects seven of the ten smells. We evaluate CROSSER on a manually labeled dataset of 82 mature projects, achieving an overall F1 score of 0.98. Finally, we investigate the presence of smells across a large dataset of 228 mature open-source projects and outline our empirical findings. Our results show a widespread frequency of the smells, as only 11% of the projects do not present any. We also show that developers may not be aware of higher-level caching functionalities.

</details>


### [524] [Weaponizing the Commons: A Taxonomy and Detection Framework of Abuse on GitHub](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.17909)
*Yuli Cheng,Xiaoyu Zhang,Jiongchi Yu,Shiqing Ma,Chao Shen,Yang Liu*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: 该论文系统研究了GitHub上的滥用行为，提出了一个分类法，并开发了一个统一的检测框架，在392个手动标注的实例上取得了超过89%的F1分数。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: GitHub在现代软件供应链中扮演关键角色，但其安全性研究主要集中在CI/CD自动化、协作模式和社区管理等方面，而滥用行为缺乏系统性的调查。现有研究对GitHub滥用行为的关注不足，需要系统性的分析和检测方法。

Method: 1. 系统回顾和总结已报告的GitHub滥用行为
2. 对公开可用的滥用案例进行实证分析
3. 构建包含392个GitHub实例的手动标注数据集
4. 从软件安全角度提出全面的滥用行为分类法
5. 基于分类法开发统一的检测框架，能够识别仓库和用户账户的所有滥用类别

Result: 1. 创建了手动标注的GitHub滥用行为数据集（392个实例）
2. 提出了全面的GitHub滥用行为分类法，涵盖多样化的症状和根本原因
3. 开发的统一检测框架在所有滥用类别上都取得了高性能（F1分数超过89%）

Conclusion: 这项工作推进了对GitHub滥用行为的理解，为大规模、系统性地分析GitHub平台奠定了基础，有助于加强软件供应链安全。该研究填补了现有研究的空白，提供了实用的检测工具和方法论。

Abstract: GitHub plays a critical role in modern software supply chains, making its security an important research concern. Existing studies have primarily focused on CI/CD automation, collaboration patterns, and community management, while abuse behaviors on GitHub have received little systematic investigation. In this paper, we systematically review and summarize reported GitHub abuse behaviors and conduct an empirical analysis of publicly available abuse cases, curating a manually labeled dataset of 392 GitHub instances. Based on this investigation, we propose a comprehensive taxonomy that characterizes their diverse symptoms and root causes from a software security perspective. Building on this taxonomy, we develop a unified detection framework capable of identifying all abuse categories across repositories and user accounts. Evaluated on the constructed dataset, the proposed framework achieves high performance across all categories (e.g., F1-score exceeding 89%). Collectively, this work advances the understanding of GitHub abuse behaviors and lays the groundwork for large-scale, systematic analysis of the GitHub platform to strengthen software supply chain security.

</details>


### [525] [When AI Models Become Dependencies: Studying the Evolution of Pre-Trained Model Reuse in Downstream Software Systems](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.17940)
*Peerachai Banyongrakkul,Mansooreh Zahedi,Christoph Treude,Haoyu Gao,Patanamon Thongtanunam*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: 该研究首次对预训练模型（PTM）作为软件依赖项的演化模式进行实证分析，发现PTM与传统软件库的变更模式存在显著差异：PTM变更频率更低、更晚引入项目、倾向于累积而非替换，且变更动机主要是能力扩展而非修复问题。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 随着AI集成系统成为主流，预训练模型（PTM）已成为永久性依赖项。然而，与传统软件库不同，PTM具有内部不透明、发布周期不标准化、多角色特性等特点。目前缺乏对PTM作为依赖项如何随时间演化的理解，这对软件维护提出了关键挑战。

Method: 采用实证研究方法，分析4,988个发布版本和323个GitHub开源仓库的数据集，这些仓库都重用了开源PTM。以传统软件库为基准，对比分析PTM的变更模式、频率、时机和文档记录情况。

Result: PTM变更频率比库变更低三倍（2,814次发布过渡中仅有406次PTM变更）。PTM通常在项目生命周期后期添加，随着项目成熟而累积而非替换。PTM变更文档记录较少，但更可能包含明确理由。PTM演化主要由能力扩展驱动，而非被动修复问题，且存在独特的"PTM测试不确定性"理由。

Conclusion: PTM作为依赖项遵循与传统软件库不同的演化模式，需要重新思考现代软件工程中PTM的跟踪和管理方式。研究呼吁开发新的依赖管理工具和实践来应对PTM的特殊性。

Abstract: Modern software systems have transitioned from purely code-based architectures to AI-integrated systems where pre-trained models (PTMs) serve as permanent dependencies. However, while the evolution of traditional software libraries is well-documented, we lack a clear understanding of how these "PTM dependencies" change over time. Unlike libraries, PTMs are characterized by opaque internals and less standardized, rapidly evolving release cycles. Furthermore, their multi-role nature enables developers to treat individual instances of a single PTM as separate functional dependencies based on their specific downstream tasks. This raises a critical question for software maintenance: do PTMs change like standard software libraries or do they follow a divergent pattern? To answer this, we present the first empirical study of downstream PTM changes, analyzing a comprehensive dataset of 4,988 releases across 323 GitHub OSS repositories that reuse open-source PTMs. Using traditional software libraries as a baseline, we find that PTMs follow a qualitatively distinct pattern. PTMs are typically added late in the project life-cycle and tend to accumulate rather than be replaced as a project matures. Our findings show that PTM changes are three times less frequent (406 of 2,814 release transitions) than library changes. PTM changes are also less routinely documented, but more likely to carry explicit rationale. Unlike libraries, which evolve reactively, PTM evolution is proactively driven by capability expansion, with a unique documented rationale of PTM testing uncertainty. Our work calls for a rethinking of how PTMs are tracked and managed as dependencies in modern software engineering.

</details>


### [526] [MASFuzzer: Fuzz Driver Generation and Adaptive Scheduling via Multidimensional API Sequences](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.17977)
*Xingyu Liu,Zengqin Huang,Xiang Gao,Hailong Sun*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: MASFUZZER是一个集成多维API序列构建和自适应模糊调度策略的模糊测试框架，用于改进软件库测试，相比现有技术提高8.54%的代码覆盖率，并发现16个未知漏洞。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统手动编写模糊驱动程序耗时且难以覆盖复杂程序行为，现有基于LLM的方法生成的驱动程序往往无法覆盖深层程序分支，需要更有效的自动化模糊测试方法。

Method: MASFUZZER通过多维API序列构建和自适应调度策略：1）从代码库中参考API使用示例，应用基于突变传播和语义感知的API序列挖掘来合成上下文相关的API调用序列；2）基于这些序列让LLM生成有效的初始驱动程序；3）采用覆盖率引导的调度器优先测试最有潜力的驱动程序；4）结合驱动程序变异策略来演化驱动程序。

Result: 在12个广泛使用的开源库上评估，MASFUZZER比最先进技术提高8.54%的代码覆盖率，发现了16个先前未知的漏洞，其中14个被开发者确认，9个获得了CVE标识。

Conclusion: MASFUZZER为模糊测试软件库提供了一种高效实用的方法，能够系统生成模糊驱动程序来探索先前未测试的代码区域。

Abstract: Fuzz testing of software libraries relies on fuzz drivers to invoke library APIs. Traditionally, these drivers are written manually by developers - a process that is time-consuming and often inadequate for exercising complex program behaviors. While recent studies have explored the use of Large Language Models (LLMs) to automate fuzz driver generation, the resulting drivers often fail to cover deep program branches. To address these challenges, we propose MASFUZZER, a fuzzing framework that integrates multidimensional API sequence construction with adaptive fuzzing scheduling strategies to improve library testing. At its core, MASFUZZER synthesizes context-relevant API call sequences by referring to API usage examples from the codebase and applying mutation-propagation-based and semantic-aware API sequence mining. These multidimensional API sequences serve as the basis for LLMs to generate effective initial drivers. In addition, MASFUZZER incorporates a coverage-guided scheduler that prioritizes testing time for the most promising drivers, along with a driver mutation strategy to evolve them. This enables systematic generation of fuzz drivers to explore previously untested code regions. We evaluate MASFUZZER on 12 widely used open-source libraries. The results show that MASFUZZER achieves 8.54 percent higher code coverage than state-of-the-art techniques. Moreover, MASFUZZER uncovers 16 previously unknown vulnerabilities in extensively tested libraries, with 14 confirmed by developers and 9 assigned CVE identifiers. These results indicate that MASFUZZER provides an efficient and practical approach for fuzzing software libraries.

</details>


### [527] [CodePivot: Bootstrapping Multilingual Transpilation in LLMs via Reinforcement Learning without Parallel Corpora](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.18027)
*Shangyu Li,Juyong Jiang,Meibo Ren,Sizhe Zhong,Huiri Tan,Yunhao Gou,Xu Han,Chun Yong Chong,Yun Peng,Jiasi Shen*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: CodePivot是一个利用Python作为中间表示的训练框架，通过新颖的强化学习奖励机制，无需平行语料库即可提升多语言代码转换能力，在10种编程语言的实验中表现出色。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有基于训练的代码转换方法存在两个主要问题：1）依赖成对转换范式，难以支持多种编程语言，特别是低资源语言；2）强化学习奖励机制不够优化。这些问题限制了模型在低资源语言转换任务中的表现。

Method: 提出CodePivot框架，使用Python作为中间表示，结合新颖的Aggressive-Partial-Functional强化学习奖励机制，通过Python到其他语言的训练来提升多语言转换能力，无需平行语料库。

Result: 在10种编程语言的实验中，7B参数的CodePivot模型在Python到其他语言和其他语言到所有语言的转换任务上，性能优于参数大数百亿的主流模型（如Deepseek-R1和Qwen3-235B-A22B-Instruct-2507），并且在通用转换任务上优于直接在任意到任意任务上训练的模型。

Conclusion: CodePivot通过Python作为中间表示和优化的强化学习奖励机制，有效解决了多语言代码转换中的训练数据稀缺问题，显著提升了低资源语言的转换性能，为代码转换任务提供了高效实用的解决方案。

Abstract: Transpilation, or code translation, aims to convert source code from one programming language (PL) to another. It is beneficial for many downstream applications, from modernizing large legacy codebases to augmenting data for low-resource PLs. Recent large language model (LLM)-based approaches have demonstrated immense potential for code translation. Among these approaches, training-based methods are particularly important because LLMs currently do not effectively adapt to domain-specific settings that suffer from a lack of knowledge without targeted training. This limitation is evident in transpilation tasks involving low-resource PLs. However, existing training-based approaches rely on a pairwise transpilation paradigm, making it impractical to support a diverse range of PLs. This limitation is particularly prominent for low-resource PLs due to a scarcity of training data. Furthermore, these methods suffer from suboptimal reinforcement learning (RL) reward formulations. To address these limitations, we propose CodePivot, a training framework that leverages Python as an intermediate representation (IR), augmented by a novel RL reward mechanism, Aggressive-Partial-Functional reward, to bootstrap the model's multilingual transpilation ability without requiring parallel corpora. Experiments involving 10 PLs show that the resulting 7B model, trained on Python-to-Others tasks, consistently improves performance across both general and low-resource PL-related transpilation tasks. It outperforms substantially larger mainstream models with hundreds of billions more parameters, such as Deepseek-R1 and Qwen3-235B-A22B-Instruct-2507, on Python-to-Others tasks and Others-to-All tasks, respectively. In addition, it outperforms its counterpart trained directly on Any-to-Any tasks on general transpilation tasks. The code and data are available at https://github.com/lishangyu-hkust/CodePivot.

</details>


### [528] [Fairness-First Design Thinking for Software Architecture](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.18055)
*Iffat Fatima,Markus Funke,Patricia Lago*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: 提出一种公平优先的设计思维方法，用于软件架构设计中解决公平性问题，并通过研究生课程实践验证其有效性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 数字系统中的公平性问题往往难以察觉和解决，需要一种系统性的方法来在软件架构设计阶段就考虑公平性。

Method: 开发公平优先的设计思维方法，并在研究生课程中实施，让学生执行所有设计思维步骤，通过分析作业数据来评估方法效果。

Result: 提供了：(1) 适用于软件架构的设计思维方法；(2) 该方法在处理问题空间和解决方案空间中公平性问题的启示；(3) 教育方面的启示。发现公平理论和情境识别对整体公平优先设计至关重要。

Conclusion: 公平优先的设计思维方法有助于在软件架构中系统性地解决公平性问题，建议使用复合视图处理跨领域关注点，未来将更新课程材料以提供端到端的公平性可追溯性。

Abstract: Fairness issues often remain hidden in digital systems, making them difficult to detect and even more difficult to address. In this study, we introduce a fairness-first Design Thinking (DT) approach to support addressing fairness concerns in software architecture (SA) design.
