We implemented our approach in a graduate-level course where students executed all steps of our DT approach as part of an assignment. We analyzed the assignment data to reflect on the implications for applying the DT approach in SA and teaching the DT approach in SA education. As a result of this study, we provide (i) a DT approach for SA, (ii) implications of the DT approach on handling fairness in both problem and solution spaces, and (iii) implications for education. Our reflections highlight that fairness theory and context identification are essential for a holistic, fairness-first design. We propose the use of composite views to address cross-cutting concerns such as fairness. In the future, we will update the course material to provide end-to-end fairness traceability in SA, helping students to understand how fairness concerns can be translated into actionable design decisions.

</details>


### [529] [WebCompass: Towards Multimodal Web Coding Evaluation for Code Language Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.18224)
*Xinping Lei,Xinyu Che,Junqi Xiong,Chenchen Zhang,Yukai Huang,Chenyu Zhou,Haoyang Huang,Minghao Liu,Letian Zhu,Hongyi Ye,Jinhua Hao,Ken Deng,Zizheng Zhan,Han Li,Dailin Li,Yifan Yao,Ming Sun,Zhaoxiang Zhang,Jiaheng Liu*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: WebCompass是一个多模态基准测试，用于评估LLM的网页工程能力，涵盖文本、图像、视频三种输入模态和生成、编辑、修复三种任务类型，采用创新的Agent-as-a-Judge评估方法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有基准测试仅评估LLM在网页编码中的狭窄能力（主要是文本条件下的生成），而忽略了视觉保真度、交互质量和代码库级推理等关键方面，无法全面衡量实际网页工程能力。

Method: 创建WebCompass基准测试，包含7个任务类别，涵盖15个生成领域、16种编辑操作类型和11种修复缺陷类型。采用多阶段人工标注流程，并创新性地使用Agent-as-a-Judge评估范式，让代理在真实浏览器中执行生成的网站，通过MCP探索交互行为并迭代合成测试用例。

Result: 评估显示：(1)闭源模型显著更强且更平衡；(2)编辑和修复具有不同的难度特征，修复在保持交互性方面更好但执行仍然困难；(3)美学是最持久的瓶颈，尤其是对开源模型；(4)框架选择显著影响结果，Vue始终具有挑战性，而React和Vanilla/HTML在不同任务类型中表现更强。

Conclusion: WebCompass为评估LLM的网页工程能力提供了全面的基准测试，揭示了当前模型在网页编码方面的能力差距，特别是美学设计和框架适应性方面的挑战，为未来模型开发提供了重要指导。

Abstract: Large language models are rapidly evolving into interactive coding agents capable of end-to-end web coding, yet existing benchmarks evaluate only narrow slices of this capability, typically text-conditioned generation with static-correctness metrics, leaving visual fidelity, interaction quality, and codebase-level reasoning largely unmeasured. We introduce WebCompass, a multimodal benchmark that provides unified lifecycle evaluation of web engineering capability. Recognizing that real-world web coding is an iterative cycle of generation, editing, and repair, WebCompass spans three input modalities (text, image, video) and three task types (generation, editing, repair), yielding seven task categories that mirror professional workflows. Through a multi-stage, human-in-the-loop pipeline, we curate instances covering 15 generation domains, 16 editing operation types, and 11 repair defect types, each annotated at Easy/Medium/Hard levels. For evaluation, we adopt a checklist-guided LLM-as-a-Judge protocol for editing and repair, and propose a novel Agent-as-a-Judge paradigm for generation that autonomously executes generated websites in a real browser, explores interactive behaviors via the Model Context Protocol (MCP), and iteratively synthesizes targeted test cases, closely approximating human acceptance testing. We evaluate representative closed-source and open-source models and observe that: (1) closed-source models remain substantially stronger and more balanced; (2) editing and repair exhibit distinct difficulty profiles, with repair preserving interactivity better but remaining execution-challenging; (3) aesthetics is the most persistent bottleneck, especially for open-source models; and (4) framework choice materially affects outcomes, with Vue consistently challenging while React and Vanilla/HTML perform more strongly depending on task type.

</details>


### [530] [Towards an Agentic LLM-based Approach to Requirement Formalization from Unstructured Specifications](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.18228)
*Alberto Tagliaferro,Bruno Guindani,Livia Lestingi,Matteo Rossi*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: 提出一种基于LLM的代理方法，从非结构化规范中自动提取可验证的形式化属性，解决自然语言需求与形式验证之间的语义对齐问题。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 安全关键系统的早期规范通常使用自然语言表达，难以推导出适合验证的形式化属性。现有LLM方法主要关注语法正确性，无法确保非正式需求与可验证属性之间的语义对齐。

Method: 采用模块化代理方法，结合需求提取、与目标形式化语言的兼容性过滤，以及形式化属性翻译。明确考虑建模和验证约束。

Result: 在三个场景的实验结果显示，该管道生成语法和语义对齐的形式化属性的准确率达到77.8%。

Conclusion: 该方法通过明确考虑建模和验证约束，是利用人工智能弥合非正式描述与语义上有意义的形式验证之间差距的重要一步。

Abstract: Early-stage specifications of safety-critical systems are typically expressed in natural language, making it difficult to derive formal properties suitable for verification and needed to guarantee safety. While recent Large Language Model (LLM)-based approaches can generate formal artifacts from text, they mainly focus on syntactic correctness and do not ensure semantic alignment between informal requirements and formally verifiable properties. We propose an agentic methodology that automatically extracts verification-ready properties from unstructured specifications. The modular pipeline combines requirement extraction, compatibility filtering with respect to a target formalism, and translation into formal properties. Experimental results across three scenarios show that the pipeline generates syntactically and semantically aligned formal properties with a 77.8% accuracy. By explicitly accounting for modeling and verification constraints, the approach is a paving step towards exploiting Artificial Intelligence (AI) to bridge the gap between informal descriptions and semantically meaningful formal verification.

</details>


### [531] [From Program Slices to Causal Clarity: Evaluating Faithful, Actionable LLM-Generated Failure Explanations via Context Partitioning and LLM-as-a-Judge](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.18309)
*Julius Porbeck,Christian Medeiros Adriano,Holger Giese*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: 研究LLM调试系统中上下文配置对故障解释质量的影响，发现证据丰富、故障特定的上下文能提升解释质量，而过大上下文则导致模糊解释，高质量解释与下游修复成功率正相关。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有LLM调试系统将故障解释视为调试或修复工作流的副产品，使用通用提示处理未区分的代码、测试和错误信息，缺乏对解释质量的专门评估。误导性解释对下游任务（如bug分类、修复）有害，需要研究如何提升解释质量。

Method: 系统性地变化调试信息，研究不同上下文组合如何影响LLM生成的故障解释质量。在真实bug上测试93种上下文配置，使用三种经济可行模型（gpt-5-mini、DeepSeek-V3.2、Grok-4.1-fast），通过六项标准评估解释质量，并通过用户研究验证LLM-as-a-judge评分与人工评分的一致性。

Result: 解释质量受上下文组合因果影响：证据丰富、故障特定的上下文能提升因果性和行动导向的质量，而过大的上下文往往产生模糊解释。高质量解释与更高的下游修复通过率相关，某些模型的修复更接近参考最小修复。低质量解释甚至可能不如无解释基线。

Conclusion: 上下文配置对LLM生成的故障解释质量有显著影响，精心设计的上下文能提升解释质量并改善下游修复效果。研究强调了将故障解释作为首要输出进行专门质量评估的重要性，而非仅作为调试副产品。

Abstract: Large language model (LLM)-based debugging systems can generate failure explanations, but these explanations may be incomplete or incorrect. Misleading explanations are harmful for downstream tasks (e.g., bug triage, bug fixing). We investigate how explanation quality is affected by various LLM context configurations. Existing work predominantly treats LLM-generated failure explanations as an ad hoc by-product of debugging or repair workflows, using generic prompting over undifferentiated artifacts such as code, tests, and error messages rather than targeting explanations as a first-class output with dedicated quality assessment. Consequently, existing approaches provide limited support for assessing whether these explanations capture the underlying fault-error-failure mechanism and for actionable next steps, and most techniques instead prioritize task success (e.g., patch correctness or review quality) over the explicit causal explanation quality. We systematically vary the debugging information to study how distinct context compositions affect the quality of LLM-generated failure explanations. Across 93 context configurations on real bugs and three economically viable models (gpt-5-mini, DeepSeek-V3.2, and Grok-4.1-fast), we evaluate explanations with six criteria and validate the LLM-as-a-judge scores against human ratings in a user study. Our results indicate that explanation quality is causally affected by context composition. Evidence-rich, failure-specific artifacts improve causal and action-oriented quality, whereas overly large contexts tend to yield vague explanations. Higher explanation-score quartiles are associated with higher downstream repair pass rates and, for some models, with fixes that are closer to the reference minimal fixes. In contrast, low-score quartiles can even underperform the no-explanation baseline. Reproduction package is publicly available.

</details>


### [532] [Reliability of AI Bots Footprints in GitHub Actions CI/CD Workflows](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.18334)
*Syed Muhammad Ashhar Shah,Sehrish Habib,Muizz Hussain,Maryam Abdul Ghafoor,Abdul Ali Bangash*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: 研究分析AI代理在CI/CD工作流中的可靠性，发现不同AI代理的成功率差异显著，且AI贡献频率与工作流成功率呈负相关。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现代软件交付中CI/CD工作流至关重要，但AI代理在这些工作流中的可靠性尚未得到充分研究，需要探索AI代理如何影响CI/CD工作流的成功率和失败模式。

Method: 使用AIDev数据集中的PR、提交和仓库数据，通过GitHub Actions API检索关联的CI/CD工作流运行，分析61,837次运行（来自2,355个仓库），这些运行由Claude、Devin、Cursor、Copilot和Codex五个AI代理触发的PR生成。

Result: Copilot和Codex的成功率最高（约93%和94%），存在显著的代理依赖性差异；仓库层面发现AI代理贡献频率与工作流成功率呈负相关；对3,067个失败工作流的PR定义了13个类别的分类法，观察到从功能性到非功能性PR类别的视觉趋势变化（但统计上不显著）。

Conclusion: 研究结果强调了需要为AI代理集成到CI/CD工作流提供可操作指导，并在最可能发生失败的工作流中优先实施安全保障措施。

Abstract: Continuous Integration and Deployment (CI/CD) workflows are central to modern software delivery, yet the reliability of agentic AI bots operating within these workflows remain underexplored. Using pull requests (PRs), commits, and repositories from the AIDev dataset, we retrieved associated CI/CD workflow runs via the GitHub Actions API and analyzed 61,837 runs from 2,355 repositories, all triggered by PRs generated by five AI bots: Claude, Devin, Cursor, Copilot, and Codex. We observed substantial agent-dependent differences in workflow reliability, with Copilot and Codex achieving the highest success rates ~93% and ~94% respectively. At the repository level, we find a negative correlation between AI agent contribution frequency and workflow success rate, suggesting that a higher frequency of Agentic PRs may hinder CI/CD workflow reliability. We defined a taxonomy of 13 categories against 3,067 agentic PRs whose associated workflows failed, and observed a trend analysis that indicates visually observable shifts from functional to non-functional PR categories over time, although these trends are not statistically significant. Our findings motivate the need for actionable guidance on integrating AI agents into CI/CD workflows and prioritizing safeguards in workflows where failures are most likely to occur.

</details>


### [533] [OpenGame: Open Agentic Coding for Games](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.18394)
*Yilei Jiang,Jinyuan Hu,Qianyin Xiao,Yaozhi Zheng,Ruize Ma,Kaituo Feng,Jiaming Han,Tianshuo Peng,Kaixuan Fan,Manyuan Zhang,Xiangyu Yue*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: OpenGame：首个开源智能体框架，专门用于端到端网页游戏开发，通过游戏技能库和专用代码模型解决现有AI在完整游戏生成中的跨文件一致性和逻辑连贯性问题。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前大型语言模型和代码智能体在解决独立编程任务时表现出色，但在从高级设计生成完整可玩游戏时，常常因跨文件不一致、场景连接断裂和逻辑不连贯而失败。游戏开发需要协调游戏引擎、实时循环和跨文件紧密耦合状态，现有AI工具无法满足这一复杂需求。

Method: 1. OpenGame框架：包含游戏技能（Game Skill），由模板技能（积累项目骨架库）和调试技能（维护已验证修复协议）组成，支持稳定架构搭建和系统化修复集成错误。
2. GameCoder-27B：专门为游戏引擎掌握设计的三阶段训练代码LLM（持续预训练、监督微调、执行基础强化学习）。
3. OpenGame-Bench：通过无头浏览器执行和视觉语言模型评估，从构建健康度、视觉可用性和意图对齐三个维度评估智能体游戏生成质量。

Result: 在150个多样化游戏提示测试中，OpenGame建立了新的最先进水平。该框架能够生成稳定、可玩的网页游戏，解决了现有AI在完整游戏开发中的核心瓶颈。

Conclusion: OpenGame将代码智能体从离散的软件工程问题推向构建复杂、交互式现实世界应用的新阶段。该框架完全开源，有望推动AI在游戏开发领域的实际应用。

Abstract: Game development sits at the intersection of creative design and intricate software engineering, demanding the joint orchestration of game engines, real-time loops, and tightly coupled state across many files. While Large Language Models (LLMs) and code agents now solve isolated programming tasks with ease, they consistently stumble when asked to produce a fully playable game from a high-level design, collapsing under cross-file inconsistencies, broken scene wiring, and logical incoherence. We bridge this gap with OpenGame, the first open-source agentic framework explicitly designed for end-to-end web game creation. At its core lies Game Skill, a reusable, evolving capability composed of a Template Skill that grows a library of project skeletons from experience and a Debug Skill that maintains a living protocol of verified fixes - together enabling the agent to scaffold stable architectures and systematically repair integration errors rather than patch isolated syntax bugs. Powering this framework is GameCoder-27B, a code LLM specialized for game engine mastery through a three-stage pipeline of continual pre-training, supervised fine-tuning, and execution-grounded reinforcement learning. Since verifying interactive playability is fundamentally harder than checking static code, we further introduce OpenGame-Bench, an evaluation pipeline that scores agentic game generation along Build Health, Visual Usability, and Intent Alignment via headless browser execution and VLM judging. Across 150 diverse game prompts, OpenGame establishes a new state-of-the-art. We hope OpenGame pushes code agents beyond discrete software engineering problems and toward building complex, interactive real-world applications. Our framework will be fully open-sourced.

</details>


### [534] [TypeScript Repository Indexing for Code Agent Retrieval](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.18413)
*Junsong Pu,Yichen Li,Zhuangbin Chen*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: ABCoder-ts-parser：基于TypeScript编译器API的新型解析器，相比现有LSP架构能更高效地为大型TypeScript代码库生成可靠的函数级代码索引。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有ABCoder框架在解析TypeScript代码库时，结合轻量级AST解析器和语言服务器进行语义解析，但LSP基于JSON-RPC的符号查找机制在大型TypeScript仓库中成为性能瓶颈。

Method: 开发了abcoder-ts-parser，直接基于TypeScript编译器API构建，利用编译器的AST、语义信息和模块解析逻辑，避免LSP的逐符号调用开销。

Result: 在三个开源TypeScript项目（最大达120万行代码）上评估，新解析器能显著更高效地生成可靠索引，性能优于现有架构。

Conclusion: 基于TypeScript编译器API的解析器解决了现有LSP架构的性能瓶颈问题，为大型TypeScript代码库的图索引提供了更高效的解决方案。

Abstract: Graph-based code indexing can improve context retrieval for LLM-based code agents by preserving call chains and dependency relationships that keyword search and similarity retrieval often miss. ABCoder is an open-source framework that parses codebases into a function-level code index called UniAST, but its existing parsers combine lightweight AST parsers for syntactic analysis with language servers for semantic resolution, but because LSP-based resolution requires a JSON-RPC call for each symbol lookup, these per-symbol calls become a bottleneck on large TypeScript repositories. We present abcoder-ts-parser, a TypeScript parser built on the TypeScript Compiler API that works directly with the compiler's AST, semantic information, and module resolution logic. We evaluate the parser on three open-source TypeScript projects with up to 1.2 million lines of code and find that it produces reliable indexes significantly more efficiently than the existing architecture. For a live demonstration, watch: https://youtu.be/ryssr7ouvdE

</details>


### [535] [Towards Better Static Code Analysis Reports: Sentence Transformer-based Filtering of Non-Actionable Alerts](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.18525)
*Tamás Aladics,Norbert Vándor,Rudolf Ferenc,Péter Hegedűs*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: 提出STAF方法，使用句子Transformer架构过滤静态代码分析中的非可操作告警，缓解告警疲劳问题，在Java项目中F1分数达89%，优于现有方法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 静态代码分析工具会产生大量非可操作告警，导致开发者"告警疲劳"而忽略所有告警，降低了工具的实际效用。

Method: 提出STAF方法，基于句子Transformer架构，利用句子嵌入技术将分析结果分类为可操作和不可操作两类。

Result: 在Java项目的大规模数据集上评估，STAF能有效减少非可操作告警，F1分数达89%，在项目内设置中优于现有方法至少11%，跨项目设置中优于至少6%。

Conclusion: STAF方法通过提供更聚焦和相关的告警集合，提高了静态分析工具在软件开发中的整体有效性，缓解了告警疲劳问题。

Abstract: Static code analysis (SCA) tools are widely used as effective ways to detect bugs and vulnerabilities in software systems. However, the reports generated by these tools often contain a large number of non-actionable findings, which can overwhelm developers to the point of ignoring them altogether -- this phenomenon is known as "alert fatigue". In this paper, we combat alert fatigue by proposing STAF: Sentence Transformer-based Actionability Filtering. Our approach leverages a transformer based architecture with sentence embeddings to classify findings into actionable and non-actionable categories. Evaluating STAF on a large dataset of reports from Java projects, we demonstrate that our method can effectively reduce the number of non-actionable findings while maintaining a high level of accuracy in identifying actionable issues. The results show that our approach can improve the usability of static analysis tools reaching an F1 score of 89%, outperforming existing methods for SCA warning filtering by at least 11% in a within-project setting and by at least 6% in a cross-project setting. By providing a more focused and relevant set of findings, we aim to enhance the overall effectiveness of static analysis in software development.

</details>


<div id='cs.SI'></div>

# cs.SI [[Back]](#toc)

### [536] [Mapping Election Toxicity on Social Media across Issue, Ideology, and Psychosocial Dimensions](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.16765)
*Lei Cao,Wen Zeng,Xinyue Wu,Eun Cheol Choi,Emilio Ferrara*

Main category: cs.SI

TL;DR: 分析2024年美国总统选举期间X平台的政治敌对言论，发现毒性内容在不同议题和意识形态间存在差异，身份议题毒性最强，党派内容比中立内容更有害，毒性言论伴随高唤醒负面情绪和道德框架。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 在线政治敌对现象普遍存在，但尚不清楚毒性内容如何随竞选议题和政治意识形态变化，以及伴随毒性表达的心理社会信号和框架是什么。研究旨在填补这一空白，提供社交媒体政治毒性话语的精细分析。

Method: 在2024年美国总统选举前后五周内，收集X平台数据，将帖子分类为10个主要竞选议题，使用人机协作的LLM辅助注释过程估计帖子意识形态，用基于LLM的毒性检测模型识别有害内容，分析毒性内容的心理驱动因素。

Result: 议题异质性：身份相关议题毒性强度最高；具体危害类别中，骚扰最普遍且强烈，仇恨集中在身份议题辩论中；党派帖子比中立帖子包含更多有害内容；毒性意识形态不对称性因议题而异；心理语言维度显示毒性话语由高唤醒负面情绪主导；左右倾向帖子在同一议题领域表现出相似情绪特征（情绪镜像）；党派群体经常依赖重叠的道德基础，议题背景强烈影响哪些道德基础最突出。

Conclusion: 在线政治毒性高度依赖情境，需要针对特定议题的方法来测量和缓解。研究提供了社交媒体政治毒性话语的精细描述，强调了议题敏感性方法的重要性。

Abstract: Online political hostility is pervasive, yet it remains unclear how toxicity varies across campaign issues and political ideology, and what psychosocial signals and framing accompany toxic expression online. In this work, we present a large-scale analysis of discourse on X (Twitter) during the five weeks surrounding the 2024 U.S. presidential election. We categorize posts into 10 major campaign issues, estimate the ideology of posts using a human-in-the-loop LLM-assisted annotation process, detect harmful content with an LLM-based toxicity detection model, and then examine the psychological drivers of toxic content. We use these annotated data to examine how harmful content varies across campaign issues and ideologies, as well as how emotional tone and moral framing shape toxicity in election discussions. Our results show issue heterogeneity in both the prevalence and intensity of toxicity. Identity-related issues displayed the highest toxicity intensity. As for specific harm categories, harassment was most prevalent and intense across most of the issues, while hate concentrated in identity-centered debates. Partisan posts contained more harmful content than neutral posts, and ideological asymmetries in toxicity varied by issue. In terms of psycholinguistic dimensions, we found that toxic discourse is dominated by high-arousal negative emotions. Left- and right-leaning posts often exhibit similar emotional profiles within the same issue domain, suggesting emotional mirroring. Partisan groups frequently rely on overlapping moral foundations, while issue context strongly shapes which moral foundations become most salient. These findings provide a fine-grained account of toxic political discourse on social media and highlight that online political toxicity is highly context-dependent, underscoring the need for issue-sensitive approaches to measuring and mitigating it.

</details>


### [537] [The Community Census and Spatial Visualization Index (CCSVI)](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.17598)
*Aaron McLean,Makena Coffman,Andy Yu,Scott Nicolas,Maja Schjervheim,Christopher Shuler,Johann Peter Lall,Sean Cleveland,Jason Leigh*

Main category: cs.SI

TL;DR: CCSVI是一个基于网络的交互式地理空间可视化平台，整合了气候灾害数据与社会经济基础设施数据，帮助用户探索环境风险与社会脆弱性之间的关联。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 夏威夷气候灾害日益频繁严重，但现有工具通常单独收集社会脆弱性和气候灾害数据，导致数据割裂难以综合分析。缺乏统一、可访问的交互式系统来分析气候灾害与社会脆弱性之间的关系。

Method: 开发CCSVI（社区普查与空间可视化指数）平台，集成气候灾害数据与经济社会基础设施数据集，通过交互式地图和分层数据可视化技术，让用户能够探索环境风险与社会脆弱性的相关性。

Result: 创建了一个统一的网络地理空间可视化平台，使决策者、研究人员和社区成员能够识别高风险人群，改善灾害准备，制定基于数据的适应策略。

Conclusion: CCSVI平台解决了夏威夷气候灾害与社会脆弱性数据割裂的问题，提供了一个可访问的交互式分析工具，有助于提高灾害应对能力和气候适应策略的制定。

Abstract: Climate hazards in Hawai'i are increasing in both frequency and severity, with varying impacts over vulnerable communities. This paper presents the Community Census and Spatial Visualization Index (CCSVI), a web-based geospatial visualization platform that integrates climate hazard data with socioeconomic and infrastructural datasets. This system enables users to explore the correlation between environmental risks and social vulnerability through interactive mapping and layered data visualizations. Social vulnerability and climate hazard data are commonly collected individually, this causes the data to be disjointed making it difficult to combine and analyze directly. With data being unrelated when collected, finding direct comparisons and combining the data is difficult resulting in many non-expert users to not understand the data. Additionally, many existing tools focus on only one of these types of data, limiting their interactivity and failing to make any improvements. CCSVI aims to handle the lack of accessible, unified, and interactive systems analyzing the relationship between climate hazards and social vulnerabilities across the state of Hawai'i. This support favors assisting decision-makers, researchers, and community members in identifying at-risk populations, improving disaster preparedness, and creating informed climate adaptation strategies.

</details>


### [538] [Topology-Aware LLM-Driven Social Simulation: A Unified Framework for Efficient and Realistic Agent Dynamics](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.18011)
*Yuwei Xu,Shulun Zhang,Yingli Zhou,Shipei Zeng,Laks V. S. Lakshmanan,Chenhao Ma*

Main category: cs.SI

TL;DR: TopoSim是一个统一拓扑感知的社会模拟框架，通过整合结构推理到智能体交互中，显著减少计算成本同时保持模拟保真度。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有基于大语言模型的社会模拟将社交网络视为固定通信支架，未能利用塑造行为收敛和异质影响的结构信号，导致低效和不现实的动态。

Method: TopoSim从两个互补维度整合结构推理：1)将具有相似结构角色和交互上下文的智能体对齐到共享骨干单元，实现协调更新；2)将社会影响建模为结构诱导信号，引入基于网络拓扑的异质交互模式。

Result: 在三个社会模拟框架和多样化数据集上的实验表明，TopoSim达到相当或改进的模拟保真度，同时减少50-90%的令牌消耗，更准确地再现真实世界社交系统的关键结构现象，并表现出强大的泛化能力和可扩展性。

Conclusion: TopoSim通过显式整合结构推理，解决了现有LLM-based社会模拟的局限性，实现了高效且真实的社交动态模拟。

Abstract: Social simulation is essential for understanding collective human behavior by modeling how individual interactions give rise to large-scale social dynamics. Recent advances in large language models (LLMs) have enabled multi-agent frameworks with human-like reasoning and communication capabilities. However, existing LLM-based simulations treat social networks as fixed communication scaffolds, failing to leverage the structural signals that shape behavioral convergence and heterogeneous influence in real-world systems, which often leads to inefficient and unrealistic dynamics. To address this challenge, we propose TopoSim, a unified topology-aware social simulation framework that explicitly integrates structural reasoning into agent interactions along two complementary dimensions. First, TopoSim aligns agents with similar structural roles and interaction contexts into shared backbone units, enabling coordinated updates that reduce redundant computation while preserving emergent social dynamics. Second, TopoSim models social influence as a structure-induced signal, introducing heterogeneous interaction patterns grounded in network topology rather than uniform influence assumptions. Extensive experiments across three social simulation frameworks and diverse datasets demonstrate that TopoSim achieves comparable or improved simulation fidelity while reducing token consumption by 50 - 90%. Moreover, our approach more accurately reproduces key structural phenomena observed in real-world social systems and exhibits strong generalization and scalability.

</details>


### [539] [Inductive Dual-Polarity Modeling via Static-Dynamic Disentanglement for Dynamic Signed Networks](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.18213)
*Yikang Hou,Junjie Huang,Yijun Ran,Tao Jia*

Main category: cs.SI

TL;DR: IDP-DSN：一种用于动态签名网络的归纳双极性框架，通过分离正负信号、仅基于历史推断未见节点表示，在冷启动评估中显著提升动态边预测性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有动态签名网络嵌入方法通常将正负信号纠缠在共享的时态状态中，并依赖节点特定的时态轨迹，这会模糊极性不对称的动态特性，损害归纳泛化能力，特别是在冷启动评估下。需要解决在测试边包含至少一个训练中未见节点时的归纳推理问题。

Method: 提出IDP-DSN框架：1）维护符号选择性记忆，分别建模正负时态动态；2）对未见节点执行仅基于历史的邻域推断（而非学习节点级轨迹）；3）通过正交正则化器强制执行极性间的静态-动态解耦。

Result: 在BitcoinAlpha、BitcoinOTC、Wiki-RfA和Epinions数据集上，相比最强基线，在转导/归纳设置下分别获得16.8/23.4%、16.9/24%、30.1/25.5%和18.7/28.9%的相对Macro-F1提升，特别在归纳冷启动评估中表现优异。

Conclusion: IDP-DSN通过分离正负动态、基于历史推断未见节点表示以及解耦静态-动态特征，有效解决了动态签名网络中的归纳推理问题，特别是在冷启动场景下显著提升了动态边预测性能。

Abstract: Dynamic signed networks (DSNs) are common in online platforms, where time-stamped positive and negative relations evolve over time. A core task in DSNs is dynamic edge prediction, which forecasts future relations by jointly modeling edge existence and polarity (positive, negative, or non-existent). However, existing dynamic signed network embedding (DSNE) methods often entangle positive and negative signals within a shared temporal state and rely on node-specific temporal trajectories, which can obscure polarity-asymmetric dynamics and harm inductive generalization, especially under cold-start evaluation. We study an inductive setting where each test edge contains at least one endpoint node held out from training, while its interactions prior to the prediction time are available as historical evidence. The model must therefore infer representations for unseen nodes solely from such limited history. We propose IDP-DSN, an Inductive Dual-Polarity framework for Dynamic Signed Networks. IDP-DSN maintains sign-selective memories to model positive and negative temporal dynamics separately, performs history-only neighborhood inference for unseen nodes (instead of learned node-wise trajectories), and enforces polarity-wise static--dynamic disentanglement via an orthogonality regularizer. Experiments on BitcoinAlpha, BitcoinOTC, Wiki-RfA, and Epinions demonstrate consistent improvements over the strongest baselines, achieving relative Macro-F1 gains of 16.8/23.4%, 16.9/24%, 30.1/25.5%, and 18.7/28.9% in the transductive/inductive settings, respectively. These results highlight the effectiveness of IDP-DSN on DSNs, particularly under inductive cold-start evaluation for dynamic signed edge prediction.

</details>


### [540] [Detectability of minority communities in networks](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.18565)
*Jiaze Li,Leto Peel*

Main category: cs.SI

TL;DR: 该论文从理论角度研究网络中少数社区的可检测性，识别了三个不同的检测阶段：可检测阶段、可区分阶段和可解析阶段，并发现谱聚类方法在识别细粒度社区结构方面存在局限性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现实世界网络中普遍存在社区结构，其中少数社区（小型群体）对于理解网络组织至关重要，但检测这些少数社区面临显著挑战。本文旨在从理论角度研究少数社区的可检测性问题。

Method: 使用随机块模型（Stochastic Block Model）作为理论框架，通过分析信号矩阵的特征值结构来推导社区检测的相变阈值，并比较谱聚类（Bethe Hessian）和信念传播（belief propagation）两种方法的检测性能。

Result: 识别了社区检测的三个不同阶段：1）可检测阶段：总体社区结构可恢复，但少数社区被合并到多数群体中；2）可区分阶段：少数社区形成与多数群体分离的连贯群体，但内部未解析；3）可解析阶段：每个少数社区完全可区分。这些阶段对应于Kesten-Stigum阈值和两个由信号矩阵特征值结构确定的额外阈值。

Conclusion: 尽管谱聚类方法在检测宏观结构方面能达到理论极限，但在识别细粒度社区结构（特别是少数社区）方面表现明显弱于信念传播方法，揭示了谱方法在精细社区检测方面的特定局限性。

Abstract: Community structure is prevalent in real-world networks, with empirical studies revealing heterogeneous distributions where a few dominant majority communities coexist with many smaller groups. These small-scale groups, which we term minority communities, are critical for understanding network organization but pose significant challenges for detection. Here, we investigate the detectability of minority communities from a theoretical perspective using the Stochastic Block Model. We identify three distinct phases of community detection: the detectable phase, where overall community structure is recoverable but minority communities are merged into majority groups; the distinguishable phase, where minority communities form a coherent group separate from the majority but remain unresolved internally; and the resolvable phase, where each minority community is fully distinguishable. These phases correspond to phase transitions at the Kesten-Stigum threshold and two additional thresholds determined by the eigenvalue structure of the signal matrix, which we derive explicitly. Furthermore, we demonstrate that spectral clustering with the Bethe Hessian exhibits significantly weaker detection performance for minority communities compared to belief propagation, revealing a specific limitation of spectral methods in identifying fine-grained community structure despite their capability to detect macroscopic structures down to the theoretical limit.

</details>


<div id='cs.NI'></div>

# cs.NI [[Back]](#toc)

### [541] [ML and Smartphones Assisted Real-Time Uplink Performance Prediction in 5G Cellular System](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.16356)
*Md Mahfuzur Rahman,Jareen Shuva,Nishith Tripathi,Lingjia Liu,Jeffrey Reed*

Main category: cs.NI

TL;DR: 提出基于机器学习和智能手机的5G上行性能预测框架，在真实室内外环境中使用实时测量数据进行评估，通过多种机器学习算法实现吞吐量和误块率的可靠预测。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统5G网络性能评估通常依赖专用设备或仿真环境，缺乏基于商用智能手机和实际测量的实用预测方法。本研究旨在开发一个使用消费级设备和广泛可用机器学习方法的5G性能预测框架。

Method: 构建基于srsRAN 5G NR栈的软件定义无线电测试环境，使用两台Google Pixel 7a智能手机采集上行指标（CQI、MCS、吞吐量、TTI、BLER）。通过Ookla、iperf等工具生成不同类型流量，涵盖静止、步行、移动场景以及LOS和nLOS传播环境。使用线性回归、决策树、随机森林、XGBoost和LightGBM五种监督回归模型进行性能预测。

Result: 研究表明，仅使用商用智能手机和广泛可用的机器学习方法，就能可靠地预测吞吐量和误块率。五种学习算法中，树集成方法（随机森林、XGBoost、LightGBM）表现最佳，为实际5G网络性能估计提供了实用途径。

Conclusion: 该框架证明了使用消费级智能手机和标准机器学习算法进行5G上行性能预测的可行性，为实际网络部署中的性能监控和优化提供了经济有效的解决方案。

Abstract: We propose a machine learning (ML) and smartphone-assisted framework for uplink performance prediction in a private, realistic 5G cellular system using real-time measurements in both indoor and outdoor settings. This work presents a comprehensive data-driven evaluation of 5G performance prediction using a controllable software-defined radio test environment. The experimental platform is built on srsRAN 5G NR stack running on a Dell workstation configured as a gNB and 5G core operating at 3.4 GHz. Two commercial Google Pixel 7a devices are instrumented to capture uplink metrics, including channel quality indicator (CQI), modulation and coding scheme (MCS), throughput, transmission time interval (TTI), and block error rate (BLER). Different types of traffic are generated using industry-standard tools such as Ookla and iperf, spanning stationary, pedestrian, and mobility cases under both line-of-sight (LOS) and non-line-of-sight (nLOS) propagation environments. Additional datasets include YouTube video sessions and global server endpoints to introduce variability in path characteristics. The resulting measurements, including multi-UE interference conditions, serve as training data for several supervised regression models. Five learning algorithms-linear regression, decision tree, random forest, XGBoost, and LightGBM-are benchmarked for prediction accuracy. The study shows that reliable forecasting of throughput and BLER is feasible using only COTS smartphones and widely available ML methods, offering a practical pathway for real-world 5G network performance estimation.

</details>


### [542] [End-to-End Performance of Video Streaming With MPEG-DASH Over Satellite 5G IAB Networks](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.16634)
*Muhammad Adeel Zahid,Ekram Hossain,Peng Hu*

Main category: cs.NI

TL;DR: 评估MPEG-DASH视频流在LEO卫星5G IAB网络中的端到端性能，比较不同传输协议和拥塞控制算法对自适应视频传输的影响，发现QUIC-BBR在流媒体QoE方面表现最均衡。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 研究现代传输协议和拥塞控制算法在集成卫星-地面网络中对自适应视频传输的影响，其中延迟、吞吐量变化和播放连续性共同影响用户体验质量。

Method: 在ns-3中实现仿真框架，整合5G无线接入网络、LEOS回程、传输层协议和MPEG-DASH应用行为模块，评估TCP和QUIC协议配合CUBIC、NewReno、BBR等拥塞控制算法的性能。

Result: 没有单一配置在所有指标上都是最优的，但在吞吐量、延迟、播放连续性和公平性之间存在明显权衡。QUIC-BBR从流媒体QoE角度提供了最均衡的整体行为，结合了足够的播放时长、较少的中断和显著低于其他方案的延迟。

Conclusion: 在评估ISTN上的自适应视频流时，需要联合考虑传输设计和拥塞控制，QUIC-BBR在集成卫星-地面网络中为自适应视频流提供了有前景的解决方案。

Abstract: We present an end-to-end performance evaluation of MPEG-DASH video streaming over a Low-Earth Orbit (LEO) satellite-based 5G Integrated Access and Backhaul (IAB) network. Our objective is to investigate how modern transport protocols and congestion control algorithms affect adaptive video delivery in an integrated satellite-terrestrial network (ISTN), where latency, throughput variation, and playback continuity jointly shape the user Quality-of-Experience (QoE). We implement a simulation framework in ns-3 by adapting open-source modules for the 5G radio access network, LEOS backhaul, transport layer protocols, and MPEG-DASH application behavior. Within this framework, TCP and QUIC are evaluated with multiple congestion control algorithms, including CUBIC, NewReno, and BBR. Performance is assessed using application-level and transport-level metrics, including playback duration, interruption duration, stall count, playback bitrate, throughput, latency, and fairness. The results show that no single configuration is uniformly optimal across all metrics. However, clear tradeoffs are observed among throughput, latency, playback continuity, and fairness. In particular, QUIC-BBR provides the most balanced overall behavior from a streaming QoE perspective, combining adequate playback duration with fewer interruptions and substantially lower latency than other alternatives. These findings highlight the importance of jointly considering transport design and congestion control when evaluating adaptive video streaming over ISTNs.

</details>


### [543] [Symphony: Taming Step Misalignments in the Network for Ring-based Collective Operations](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.16880)
*Yuze Jin,Xin Zhe Khooi,Ruyi Yao,Mun Choon Chan*

Main category: cs.NI

TL;DR: Symphony：一种网络内解决方案，通过检测流水线步骤错位并利用拥塞信号选择性节流超前流，改善环形集体操作的性能，减少网络抖动和拥塞的影响。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 环形集体操作在分布式AI训练中广泛应用，但其性能严重依赖同步的逐步推进，而实际网络中的抖动和拥塞会导致步骤错位，增加集体操作完成时间。

Method: 提出Symphony网络内解决方案：1）轻量级机制跟踪每个作业的流水线进度；2）创新性地利用拥塞信号选择性节流超前流，让滞后流能够追赶，无需全局协调。

Result: 通过Astra-Sim模拟显示，Symphony有效缓解环形集体操作中的步骤错位，使作业/集体通信时间提升高达54%。在Intel Tofino2可编程交换机上的原型验证了其实用性。

Conclusion: Symphony通过智能的网络内机制解决了环形集体操作中的步骤错位问题，显著提升了分布式AI训练中的通信性能，且具有实际部署可行性。

Abstract: Ring-based collective operations are widely used in distributed AI training due to their efficient bandwidth utilization. While ring communication excels at pipelining, its performance is heavily dependent on having synchronized step-wise progression. This presents a mismatch to the underlying network conditions in practice: collective operations are vulnerable to network jitter and congestion, leading to step misalignment and increased collective completion time. To that end, we propose Symphony, an in-network solution that detects pipeline step misalignment and mitigates its impact. Symphony introduces (1) a lightweight mechanism to track per-job pipeline progress and (2) a novel use of congestion signals to selectively throttle outpacing flows, allowing lagging flows to catch up without global coordination. Through simulations using Astra-Sim, we show that Symphony effectively mitigates step misalignments in ring-based collectives, resulting in up to 54% improvement in job/collective communication time. Finally, we prototype and validate Symphony on an Intel Tofino2 programmable switch to demonstrate its practicality.

</details>


### [544] [Safety-Aware AoI Scheduling for LEO Satellite-Assisted Autonomous Driving](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.17281)
*Kangkang Sun,Junyi He,Juntong Liu,Xiuzhen Chen,Jianhua Li,Minyi Guo*

Main category: cs.NI

TL;DR: 论文提出SafeScale-MATD3框架，解决LEO卫星回程中车辆编队通信的复合多普勒效应、子时隙切换中断和异构新鲜度需求问题，通过双时间尺度AoI模型和分层安全约束，显著降低碰撞警报违规率。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有框架无法同时处理卫星和车辆运动带来的复合多普勒效应、子时隙切换中断超过碰撞警报期限的问题，以及三类车辆优先级的不同新鲜度需求。核心挑战是时间尺度不匹配：粗粒度控制时隙隐藏了子时隙中断，使得AoI峰值分析和安全验证变得困难。

Method: 提出统一框架，将双时间尺度AoI模型与通过虚拟队列强制执行的分层时间平均安全约束相结合。推导出乒乓切换的AoI包络闭式解，发现累积惩罚随振荡长度呈二次增长。基于漂移加惩罚模板实例化为SafeScale-MATD3，采用主动切换定时和多任务双批评家多智能体强化学习。

Result: SafeScale-MATD3是唯一满足严格1%碰撞警报违规预算的方法，相比基线将违规率降低4-5.5倍，同时实现35%更低的碰撞警报AoI，并在能量和新鲜度权衡上达到严格的帕累托优势。

Conclusion: 抑制短暂但重复的乒乓切换振荡比缩短任何单次中断带来更大的安全回报，时隙级AoI核算是LEO切换下可验证碰撞警报保证的必要条件。该框架为安全关键车辆通信提供了有效的解决方案。

Abstract: Autonomous platoons traversing infrastructure gaps increasingly depend on LEO satellite backhaul for safety-critical updates, yet no existing framework jointly addresses compound Doppler from simultaneous satellite and vehicle motion, sub-slot handover outages that exceed collision-alert deadlines, and heterogeneous freshness requirements across three vehicular priority classes. The core challenge is a \emph{timescale mismatch}: coarse control slots hide sub-slot outages, which makes both AoI spike analysis and safety verification ill-posed. Ping-pong handover oscillations further compound AoI cost in a way that purely reactive schedulers cannot mitigate. We address these challenges through a unified framework that couples a two-timescale AoI model with tiered time-average safety constraints enforced by virtual queues. A closed-form ping-pong AoI envelope reveals that cumulative penalty grows quadratically in oscillation length, analytically justifying oscillation suppression as the highest-leverage safety mechanism. The resulting drift-plus-penalty template is instantiated as SafeScale-MATD3 with proactive handover timing and multi-task dual-critic MARL. A key finding is that suppressing brief but repeated ping-pong oscillations yields larger safety returns than shortening any single outage, and that tick-level AoI accounting is a necessary condition for verifiable collision-alert guarantees under LEO handovers. Simulations show that SafeScale-MATD3 is the only method satisfying the strict 1 % collision-alert violation budget, reducing violation rate by 4 to 5.5 times versus baselines, while achieving 35 % lower collision-alert AoI and strict Pareto dominance on the energy and freshness tradeoff.

</details>


### [545] [Scheduling in Multi-Hop Wireless Networks With Deadlines](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.17493)
*Nicholas Jones,Eytan Modiano*

Main category: cs.NI

TL;DR: 该论文研究无线网络中满足端到端服务质量保证（瞬时吞吐量和硬包截止时间）的调度问题，提出网络切片模型解耦流间排队动态，证明链路调度策略对满足硬截止时间保证至关重要，并开发了去中心化多项式时间算法实现紧截止时间保证和近最优吞吐量。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 无线网络中需要满足端到端服务质量保证，特别是瞬时吞吐量和硬包截止时间。现有调度方法在保证硬截止时间方面存在不足，尤其是在多流干扰环境下，队列稳定性不足以保证紧截止时间，需要新的调度策略来同时满足吞吐量和截止时间要求。

Method: 采用网络切片模型解耦流间排队动态；分析孤立流的吞吐量和截止时间最优策略作为多流情况下的可行性边界；推导端到端包延迟与链路调度间隔时间的关系；将问题转化为广义pinwheel调度问题；开发去中心化多项式时间算法。

Result: 证明链路调度策略对满足硬截止时间保证有重要影响；在多流设置下，最坏情况稳定策略下包延迟可能无限增长，队列稳定性不足以保证紧截止时间；推导出端到端包延迟的条件；提出能在任何干扰模型下通过解决广义pinwheel调度问题实现硬保证；开发的算法能实现紧端到端包截止时间保证和近最优吞吐量。

Conclusion: 无线网络中满足硬截止时间保证的关键在于链路调度策略，而不仅仅是队列稳定性。通过将问题转化为广义pinwheel调度问题，可以在任何干扰模型下实现硬保证。提出的去中心化多项式时间算法能有效平衡吞吐量和截止时间要求，为无线网络服务质量保证提供了实用解决方案。

Abstract: We analyze the problem of scheduling in wireless networks to meet end-to-end service guarantees, defined by instantaneous throughput and hard packet deadlines. Using a network slicing model to decouple the queueing dynamics between flows, we show that the network's ability to meet hard deadline guarantees under interference is largely influenced by the link scheduling policy. We characterize throughput- and deadline-optimal policies for a solitary flow operating in isolation, which provide bounds on feasibility in the general case with multiple flows. We prove that packet delays can grow arbitrarily large in the multi-flow setting under a worst-case stabilizing policy, showing that queue stability is not sufficient to guarantee tight deadlines. We derive conditions on end-to-end packet delays in terms of link inter-scheduling times, and show that it is possible to make hard guarantees under any interference model by solving a generalized version of the pinwheel scheduling problem. Finally, we introduce a decentralized polynomial-time algorithm which can meet tight end-to-end packet deadlines while achieving near-optimal throughput.

</details>


### [546] [Lagrange Index based Scheduling for Minimizing Age of Updates from Heterogeneous Sources](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.18077)
*Aniket Mukherjee,Joy Kuri,Chandramani Singh*

Main category: cs.NI

TL;DR: 提出一种基于拉格朗日指数的启发式算法，用于异构无线传感器网络中加权平均AoI最小化调度问题


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现代传感系统产生从状态小包到大数据对象的异构更新，在严格介质访问约束和非抢占传输下，决策阶段变得依赖动作且随机，需要解决异构新鲜度感知系统的调度问题

Method: 将问题建模为具有半马尔可夫决策过程的 restless 多臂赌博机问题，开发基于拉格朗日指数的启发式算法，利用启发式结构特性实现高效指数计算

Result: 数值结果表明，相比现有非抢占调度策略，该算法能持续获得性能增益，为异构新鲜度感知系统提供实用解决方案

Conclusion: 提出的拉格朗日指数启发式算法能有效解决异构无线传感器网络中的加权平均AoI最小化调度问题，在严格访问约束下实现性能提升

Abstract: Modern sensing systems generate heterogeneous updates ranging from small status packets to large data objects. We study a single-hop wireless uplink network where sensors generate updates at will, each consisting of a sensor dependent number of packets. Under a strict medium-access constraint and non-preemptive (no-switching) transmissions, decision stages become action-dependent and stochastic. We formulate the problem as a restless multi-armed bandit (RMAB) with semi-Markov decision process (SMDP) dynamics and develop a Lagrange index based heuristic for minimizing weighted average AoI cost. For the weighted AoI setting, we utilize the structural properties of the heuristic to enable efficient index computation. Numerical results demonstrate consistent performance gains over existing non-preemptive scheduling policies, providing a practical solution for heterogeneous freshness-aware systems.

</details>


### [547] [Tabu Search for Tactical Wireless Network Design in Challenging Environments](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.18318)
*Wisssem Ahmed Zaid,Alain Hertz*

Main category: cs.NI

TL;DR: 提出两种禁忌搜索算法用于战术无线网络设计，优化信号强度和覆盖范围，减少干扰


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 战术无线网络在自然灾害等传统电信基础设施不可用或损坏的场景中至关重要，需要满足工业合作伙伴的具体约束条件

Method: 提出两种包含多个启发式子程序的禁忌搜索算法，能够高效生成高质量的网络设计方案

Result: 合成测试结果表明，该方法能够快速有效地生成网络，相比现有方法有显著改进

Conclusion: 提出的禁忌搜索算法能够有效解决战术无线网络设计问题，满足工业约束并优化网络性能

Abstract: Tactical wireless networks play a vital role in ensuring reliable connectivity in scenarios where conventional telecommunications infrastructure is unavailable or damaged, such as areas impacted by natural disasters. These networks are designed to operate efficiently in difficult and unpredictable environments by adapting to the unique characteristics of the terrain. This research addresses a real-world challenge from the communications industry: designing tactical wireless networks that meet the specific constraints defined by our industrial partner, with the goal of optimizing signal strength and coverage while minimizing interference. To this end, we propose two tabu search algorithms that incorporate several heuristic subroutines, enabling the efficient generation of high-quality network designs. Results from synthetic tests demonstrate that our approach produces networks rapidly and effectively, offering significant improvements over existing methods.

</details>


### [548] [Sub-additive service curves in the Network Calculus analysis](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.18370)
*Anne Bouillard*

Main category: cs.NI

TL;DR: 该论文反驳了Hamscher等人关于网络演算中允许负值函数的观点，证明传统非负函数分析在反馈控制系统等复杂场景中仍然可行且更可靠。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: Hamscher等人的近期研究提出在网络演算中允许函数取负值可以处理传统非负函数假设下难以分析的情况，特别是在反馈控制系统中。本文旨在反驳这一观点，证明传统分析方法在所有这些情况下仍然有效。

Method: 1. 对次可加函数进行详细分析；2. 证明Hamscher等人使用负值函数分析复杂反馈控制系统的方法存在缺陷且不稳定；3. 在可能的情况下，使用传统假设提供修正的分析方法。

Result: 1. 证明了传统非负函数分析在所有Hamscher等人提到的案例中都是可行的；2. 揭示了Hamscher等人使用负值函数分析反馈控制系统的方法存在不稳定性问题；3. 提供了基于传统假设的修正分析方法。

Conclusion: 网络演算的传统非负函数假设仍然是安全可靠的，允许负值函数不仅不必要，反而可能导致分析结果不可靠。次可加函数的详细分析是解决复杂系统分析的关键。

Abstract: Network Calculus is a theoretical model that aims at providing upper bounds of worst-case performance (such as delay or buffer occupancy). This is a mathematical framework that handles both network modeling and network analysis. As such it has requirements regarding the space of functions needed for a safe analysis. Namely, the functions need to be non-negative, as they model a quantity of data. This results in some pitfall for the analysis, where hypothesis matter.
  A recent paper by Hamscher et al. states that allowing functions with negative values can also lead to a valid analysis, in cases that would be untractable with the non-negative assumption results, especially when feedback control is present in the system.
  In this paper, we show that, on the contrary, a more conventional analysis is possible in all the mentioned cases. The key is a detailed analysis of sub-additive functions. Second, we show that the analysis of complex feedback control systems, presented by Hamscher et al. in a second paper that uses functions with negative values, is unsound and has stability issues. We give a corrected analysis, when possible, with conventional hypotheses.

</details>


### [549] [Spectrum Configuration Framework for Throughput Maximization in Open Systems with Roll-Off-Based QoT Optimization](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.18374)
*Peyman Pahlevanzadeh,Venkata Virajit Garbhapu,Agastya Raj,Dmitrii Briantcev,Dan Kilper,Marco Ruffini*

Main category: cs.NI

TL;DR: 提出用于开放解耦光系统的频谱配置框架，在保证传输质量(QoT)余量的同时最大化吞吐量，通过联合优化收发器参数和WSS带宽，实现高效频谱利用和自适应吞吐量-余量权衡。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 在开放解耦光系统中，需要一种能够同时最大化吞吐量并保证传输质量余量的频谱配置方法，以应对固定频谱分配约束下的资源优化挑战。

Method: 提出联合优化框架，同时优化调制格式、符号率、脉冲整形滚降因子和波长选择开关(WSS)带宽；首先实验评估滚降因子优化对级联WSS滤波的影响，然后基于背包优化算法在OSaaS场景中选择服务配置。

Result: 实验验证表明，滚降因子优化在单通道和多通道传输中都能带来可测量的QoT增益；在城域规模开放测试平台上，该框架能有效实现高效频谱利用和自适应吞吐量-余量权衡。

Conclusion: 提出的频谱配置框架能够在保证传输质量余量的前提下最大化吞吐量，为开放解耦光系统提供有效的频谱利用和自适应资源配置方案。

Abstract: We propose a spectrum-configuration framework for open and disaggregated optical systems that maximizes throughput while guaranteeing the quality of transmission (QoT) margins. The framework jointly optimizes transceiver parameters, including modulation format, symbol rate, pulse-shaping roll-off factor, and wavelength-selective switch (WSS) bandwidth, under fixed spectral allocation constraints. The impact of roll-off factor optimization is first experimentally evaluated in the presence of cascaded WSS filtering, demonstrating measurable QoT gains for both single- and multi-channel transmission. Building on these observations, a knapsack-based optimization is applied in the context of Optical Spectrum as a Service (OSaaS) to select service configurations that maximize aggregate throughput within a fixed spectrum width and limited transceiver resources. Experimental validation on a metro-scale open testbed confirms the effectiveness of the proposed approach in achieving efficient spectrum utilization and adaptive throughput-margin trade-offs.

</details>


<div id='cs.AI'></div>

# cs.AI [[Back]](#toc)

### [550] [Governing the Agentic Enterprise: A Governance Maturity Model for Managing AI Agent Sprawl in Business Operations](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.16338)
*Vivek Acharya*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 论文提出企业AI代理治理成熟度模型(AAGMM)，解决AI代理无序扩张问题，通过五级框架和12个治理领域帮助企业实现有效治理。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 企业AI代理的快速采用导致治理危机：代理无序扩张、冗余冲突、缺乏管控。行业调查显示仅21%企业有成熟的治理模型，40%AI代理项目因治理不足预计失败。学术研究缺乏连接治理能力与业务成果的实证验证模型。

Method: 提出AI代理治理成熟度模型(AAGMM)，包含五个成熟度级别和12个治理领域，基于NIST AI RMF和ISO/IEC 42001标准。同时提出代理扩张模式分类学，包括功能重复、影子代理、孤儿代理、权限蔓延和未监控委托链等模式。通过750次模拟运行在五个企业场景和五个治理成熟度级别进行验证。

Result: 结果显示不同治理成熟度级别之间存在统计学显著差异(p<0.001，效应量d>2.0)。Level 4-5组织相比Level 1：代理扩张指数降低94.3%，风险事件减少96.4%，有效任务完成率提高32.6%。

Conclusion: AAGMM为实践者提供了可操作的路线图，既能有效治理自主AI代理，又能最大化业务回报，填补了学术研究和企业实践之间的空白。

Abstract: The rapid adoption of agentic AI in enterprise business operations--autonomous systems capable of planning, reasoning, and executing multi-step workflows--has created an urgent governance crisis. Organizations face uncontrolled agent sprawl: the proliferation of redundant, ungoverned, and conflicting AI agents across business functions. Industry surveys report that only 21% of enterprises have mature governance models for autonomous agents, while 40% of agentic AI projects are projected to fail by 2027 due to inadequate governance and risk controls. Despite growing acknowledgment of this challenge, academic literature lacks a formal, empirically validated governance maturity model connecting governance capability to measurable business outcomes. This paper introduces the Agentic AI Governance Maturity Model (AAGMM), a five-level framework spanning 12 governance domains, grounded in NIST AI RMF and ISO/IEC 42001 standards. We additionally propose a novel taxonomy of agent sprawl patterns--functional duplication, shadow agents, orphaned agents, permission creep, and unmonitored delegation chains--each linked to quantifiable business cost models. The framework is validated through 750 simulation runs across five enterprise scenarios and five governance maturity levels, measuring business outcomes including cost containment, risk incident rates, operational efficiency, and decision quality. Results demonstrate statistically significant differences (p < 0.001, large effect sizes d > 2.0) between all governance maturity levels, with Level 4-5 organizations achieving 94.3% lower sprawl indices, 96.4% fewer risk incidents, and 32.6% higher effective task completion rates compared to Level 1. The AAGMM provides practitioners with an actionable roadmap for governing autonomous AI agents while maximizing business returns.

</details>


### [551] [Semantic Consensus: Process-Aware Conflict Detection and Resolution for Enterprise Multi-Agent LLM Systems](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.16339)
*Vivek Acharya*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: SCF框架通过语义共识机制解决多智能体LLM系统中的语义意图分歧问题，显著提升工作流完成率至100%。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前多智能体LLM系统在生产环境中失败率高达41%-86.7%，其中79%的失败源于规范和协调问题而非模型能力限制。语义意图分歧（智能体对共享目标产生不一致解释）是主要但未正式解决的根本原因。

Method: 提出语义共识框架（SCF），包含六个组件：过程上下文层（共享操作语义）、语义意图图（形式化意图表示）、冲突检测引擎（实时识别矛盾意图）、共识解决协议（策略-权威-时间层次结构）、漂移监控器（检测语义分歧）、过程感知治理集成层（组织策略执行）。

Result: 在三个多智能体框架（AutoGen、CrewAI、LangGraph）和四个企业场景的600次运行中，SCF是唯一实现100%工作流完成率的方法（次优基线仅25.1%），能检测65.2%的语义冲突（精度27.9%），并提供完整的治理审计跟踪。

Conclusion: SCF通过形式化解决语义意图分歧问题，显著提升多智能体LLM系统的可靠性和协调性，支持协议无关性并与MCP和A2A通信标准兼容。

Abstract: Multi-agent large language model (LLM) systems are rapidly emerging as the dominant architecture for enterprise AI automation, yet production deployments exhibit failure rates between 41% and 86.7%, with nearly 79% of failures originating from specification and coordination issues rather than model capability limitations. This paper identifies Semantic Intent Divergence--the phenomenon whereby cooperating LLM agents develop inconsistent interpretations of shared objectives due to siloed context and absent process models--as a primary yet formally unaddressed root cause of multi-agent failure in enterprise settings. We propose the Semantic Consensus Framework (SCF), a process-aware middleware comprising six components: a Process Context Layer for shared operational semantics, a Semantic Intent Graph for formal intent representation, a Conflict Detection Engine for real-time identification of contradictory, contention-based, and causally invalid intent combinations, a Consensus Resolution Protocol using a policy--authority--temporal hierarchy, a Drift Monitor for detecting gradual semantic divergence, and a Process-Aware Governance Integration layer for organizational policy enforcement. Evaluation across 600 runs spanning three multi-agent frameworks (AutoGen, CrewAI, LangGraph) and four enterprise scenarios demonstrates that SCF is the only approach to achieve 100% workflow completion--compared to 25.1% for the next-best baseline--while detecting 65.2% of semantic conflicts with 27.9% precision and providing complete governance audit trails. The framework is protocol-agnostic and compatible with MCP and A2A communication standards.

</details>


### [552] [Computational Hermeneutics: Evaluating generative AI as a cultural technology](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.16403)
*Cody Kommers,Ruth Ahnert,Maria Antoniak,Emmanouil Benetos,Steve Benford,Mercedes Bunz,Baptiste Caramiaux,Shauna Concannon,Martin Disley,James Dobson,Yali Du,Edgar Duéñez-Guzmán,Kerry Francksen,Evelyn Gius,Jonathan W. Y. Gray,Ryan Heuser,Sarah Immel,Richard Jean So,Sang Leigh,Dalaki Livingston,Hoyt Long,Meredith Martin,Georgia Meyer,Daniela Mihai,Ashley Noel-Hirst,Kirsten Ostherr,Deven Parker,Yipeng Qin,Jessica Ratcliff,Emily Robinson,Karina Rodriguez,Adam Sobey,Ted Underwood,Aditya Vashistha,Matthew Wilkens,Youyou Wu,Yuan Zheng,Drew Hemment*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 论文提出生成式AI应被视为"语境机器"，需从解释学角度评估其文化理解能力，而非仅测量准确性


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前AI评估框架将文化视为可测量变量，而非系统运作的根本要素，忽略了生成式AI作为文化技术的本质

Method: 借鉴人文学科的解释学理论，提出计算解释学框架，将GenAI视为必须处理三种解释挑战的"语境机器"：情境性、多元性和模糊性

Result: 提出解释学评估三原则：基准测试应是迭代而非一次性；应包含人而不仅是机器；应测量文化语境而不仅是模型输出

Conclusion: 这为当代AI系统设计和评估提供了新范式：从关于准确性的标准化问题转向关于意义的语境化问题

Abstract: Generative AI systems are increasingly recognized as cultural technologies, yet current evaluation frameworks often treat culture as a variable to be measured rather than fundamental to the system's operation. Drawing on hermeneutic theory from the humanities, we argue that GenAI systems function as "context machines" that must inherently address three interpretive challenges: situatedness (meaning only emerges in context), plurality (multiple valid interpretations coexist), and ambiguity (interpretations naturally conflict). We present computational hermeneutics as an emerging framework offering an interpretive account of what GenAI systems do, and how they might do it better. We offer three principles for hermeneutic evaluation -- that benchmarks should be iterative, not one-off; include people, not just machines; and measure cultural context, not just model output. This perspective offers a nascent paradigm for designing and evaluating contemporary AI systems: shifting from standardized questions about accuracy to contextual ones about meaning.

</details>


### [553] [LLMs can persuade only psychologically susceptible humans on societal issues, via trust in AI and emotional appeals, amid logical fallacies](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.16935)
*Alexis Carrillo,Salvatore Citraro,Ali Aghazhadeh Ardebili,Enrique Taietta,Giulio Rossetti,Emilio Ferrara,Giuseppe Alessandro Veltri,Massimo Stella*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: Talk2AI框架量化LLMs在争议话题上的说服力与拟人性，发现人类对初始观点有纵向惯性，LLMs与人类均使用谬误推理，心理特征可预测LLMs的拟人性感知


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 缺乏基于时间演化心理学框架的LLMs说服力与拟人性纵向研究，需要量化LLMs在争议社会话题上如何通过心理社会路径影响人类观点

Method: Talk2AI纵向框架，770名参与者与4个主流LLMs进行结构化对话，涉及气候变化等争议话题，产生3,080次对话共60,000轮，收集信念强度、观点变化、拟人性感知等数据，使用NLP分析和可解释AI方法

Result: 发现人类对初始观点有纵向惯性；LLMs与人类每6次对话中就有1次使用谬误推理；拟人性感知最可预测(R²=0.44)；存在易受LLM影响的个体，其特点是更信任LLMs、更随和、外向且认知需求更高

Conclusion: Talk2AI提供了检测生成式AI如何通过多重心理社会路径影响人类观点的实证框架，挑战了"LLMs作为优越系统"的刻板印象，揭示了AI-人类数字平台中的复杂互动机制

Abstract: Scarce longitudinal evidence examines LLMs' persuasiveness and humanness along time-evolving psychological frameworks. We introduce Talk2AI, a longitudinal framework quantifying psycho-social, reasoning and affective dimensions of LLMs' persuasiveness about polarizing societal topics. In a four-way longitudinal setup, Talk2AI's 770 participants engaged in structured conversations with one of four leading LLMs on topics like climate change, social media misinformation, and math anxiety. This produced 3,080 conversations over 60,000 turns. After each wave, participants reported conviction in their initial topic stance, perceived opinion change, LLM's perceived humanness, a self-donation to the topic and a textual explanation. Feedback time series showed longitudinal inertia in convictions, indicating some human anchoring to initial opinions even after repeated exposure to AI-generated arguments. Interestingly, NLP analyses revealed that both humans and LLMs relied on fallacious reasoning in 1 conversational quip every 6, countering the ``LLMs as superior systems" stereotype behind LLMs' cognitive surrender. LLMs' perceived humanness was most learnable from sociodemographic, psychological and engagement features ($R^2=0.44$), followed by opinion change ($R^2=0.34$), conviction ($R^2=0.26$) and personal endowment ($R^2=0.24$). Crucially, explainable AI (XAI) indicated: (i) the presence of individuals more susceptible to LLM-based opinion changes; (ii) psychological susceptibility to LLM-convincing consisted of having more trust in LLMs, being more agreeable and extraverted and with a higher need for cognition. A multiverse approach with mixed-effects models confirmed XAI results, alongside strong individual differences. Talk2AI provides a grounded framework and evidence for detecting how GenAI can influence human opinions via multiple psycho-social pathways in AI-human digital platforms.

</details>


### [554] [Heterogeneous Self-Play for Realistic Highway Traffic Simulation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.16406)
*Jinkai Qiu,Alessandro Saviolo,Chaojie Wang,Mingke Wang,Xiaoyu Huang*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: PHASE：基于上下文感知自博弈的高速公路多智能体仿真框架，通过合成场景生成和闭环训练实现可控、真实的高速公路交通模拟


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 高速公路仿真对自动驾驶安全评估至关重要，但现有方法难以同时满足：1）覆盖不同速度和机动动作的广泛场景；2）可控生成罕见安全关键场景；3）多智能体交互的行为可信度

Method: 提出PHASE框架：1）基于智能体特定条件的显式控制；2）合成场景生成实现广泛覆盖；3）闭环多智能体训练确保真实交互动态。支持不同车辆类型（轿车、拖挂卡车），采用车辆感知动力学、上下文条件动作、早期终止、碰撞归因、奖励塑形、耦合课程学习和鲁棒策略优化等技术

Result: 在exiD数据集512个未见真实场景上零样本转移，成功率96.3%，ADE/FDE从6.57/12.07m降至2.44/5.25m。在轨迹嵌入空间中，相比IDM模型，Fréchet轨迹距离减少13.1%，能量距离减少20.2%

Conclusion: 合成自博弈方法无需专家数据模仿即可提供可扩展、可控且真实的高速公路场景生成路径，为自动驾驶安全评估提供了有效解决方案

Abstract: Realistic highway simulation is critical for scalable safety evaluation of autonomous vehicles, particularly for interactions that are too rare to study from logged data alone. Yet highway traffic generation remains challenging because it requires broad coverage across speeds and maneuvers, controllable generation of rare safety-critical scenarios, and behavioral credibility in multi-agent interactions. We present PHASE, Policy for Heterogeneous Agent Self-play on Expressway, a context-aware self-play framework that addresses these three requirements through explicit per-agent conditioning for controllability, synthetic scenario generation for broad highway coverage, and closed-loop multi-agent training for realistic interaction dynamics. PHASE further supports different vehicle profiles, for example, passenger cars and articulated trailer trucks, within a single policy via vehicle-aware dynamics and context-conditioned actions, and stabilizes self-play with early termination of unrecoverable states, at-fault collision attribution, highway-aware reward shaping, coupled curricula, and robust policy optimization. Despite being trained only on synthetic data, PHASE transfers zero-shot to 512 unseen high-interaction real scenarios in exiD, achieving a 96.3% success rate and reducing ADE/FDE from 6.57/12.07 m to 2.44/5.25 m relative to a prior self-play baseline. In a learned trajectory embedding space, it also improves behavioral realism over IDM, reducing Frechet trajectory distance by 13.1% and energy distance by 20.2%. These results show that synthetic self-play can provide a scalable route to controllable and realistic highway scenario generation without direct imitation of expert logs.

</details>


### [555] [Support Sufficiency as Consequence-Sensitive Compression in Belief Arbitration](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.16434)
*Mark Walsh*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 论文提出了一种支持感知的循环仲裁架构，通过动态压缩假设几何来平衡保留信息与资源约束，自适应控制器在累积效用上优于固定分辨率控制器。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统系统在做出假设时，大部分证据结构会因压缩而丢失，仅靠选择内容和标量置信度不足以支持下游控制。需要确定在压缩过程中必须保留什么信息，这本身就是一个后果敏感的问题。

Method: 开发了一种循环仲裁架构，其中活跃约束场共同确定候选假设的几何结构。系统将该几何结构压缩为支持感知的控制状态，其分辨率由当前后果几何、仲裁记忆和资源约束共同调节。

Result: 自适应控制器在调节支持分辨率方面优于所有固定分辨率控制器。敏捷自适应控制优于迟钝自适应控制。固定高分辨率控制虽然实现了最佳承诺准确性，但由于资源成本和学习碎片化，仍落后于自适应控制器。

Conclusion: 支持充分性不应被视为静态表示阈值，而应视为动态压缩标准。稳健仲裁取决于在当前后果环境下保留足够策略的最小支持结构，并在推理和行动的重复周期中随着条件变化调节该结构。

Abstract: When a system commits to a hypothesis, much of the evidential structure behind that commitment is lost to compression. Standard accounts assume that selected content and scalar confidence suffice for downstream control. This paper argues that they do not, and that determining what must survive compression is itself a consequence-sensitive problem. We develop a recurrent arbitration architecture in which active constraint fields jointly determine a hypothesis geometry over candidates. Rather than carrying that geometry forward in full, the system compresses it into a support-aware control state whose resolution is regulated by current consequence geometry, arbitration memory, and resource constraints.
  A bounded objective formalizes the tradeoff. Too little retained support collapses policy-relevant distinctions, producing controllers that select content adequately while misrouting verification, abstention, and recovery. Too much retained support fragments learning across overly fine contexts, degrading adaptation even as discrimination improves. These failure modes yield ordered controller predictions confirmed by a minimal repeated-interaction simulation. Adaptive controllers that regulate support resolution outperform all fixed-resolution controllers in cumulative utility. Agile adaptive control outperforms sluggish adaptive control. Fixed high-resolution control achieves the best commitment accuracy but still trails adaptive controllers because resource cost and learning fragmentation offset the gains from richer retention.
  Support sufficiency should be understood not as a static representational threshold, but as a dynamic compression criterion. Robust arbitration depends on preserving the smallest support structure adequate for policy under the current consequence landscape, and on regulating that structure as conditions change across repeated cycles of inference and action.

</details>


### [556] [Healthcare AI for Automation or Allocation? A Transaction Cost Economics Framework](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.16465)
*Ari Ercole*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 研究使用O*NET职业数据库，通过LLM编码医疗任务到交易成本类别，发现临床角色比非临床角色有更高的交易成本强度，主要由信息搜索和决策相关协调负担驱动，表明数字和AI干预机会分布不均，受协调结构而非技术复杂性影响。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 医疗生产力不仅受临床复杂性影响，还受不确定性下协调工作的成本影响。交易成本经济学提供了协调摩擦的理论，但很少在医疗职业的任务层面进行操作化。研究旨在量化医疗工作中不同职业的交易成本差异。

Method: 使用O*NET职业数据库的任务陈述和频率权重，在任务粒度上表征医疗工作。通过受限的大型语言模型将每个独特任务编码到一个主导的交易成本类别（信息搜索、决策与谈判、监控与执行、适应与协调）和总体交易成本强度分数。然后聚合到职业层面进行分析。

Result: 临床角色比非临床角色表现出显著更高的交易成本强度，主要由更大的信息搜索和决策相关协调负担驱动。职业内部的交易成本分散度没有差异。这些发现表明医疗角色间协调工作的系统性异质性。

Conclusion: 数字和AI干预的机会在医疗角色间分布不均，受底层协调结构而非技术任务复杂性的影响更大。研究为理解医疗工作中的协调摩擦提供了任务层面的实证基础。

Abstract: Healthcare productivity is shaped not only by clinical complexity but by the costs of coordinating work under uncertainty. Transaction-cost economics offers a theory of these coordination frictions, yet has rarely been operationalised at task level across health occupations. Using task statements and frequency weights from the O*NET occupational database, we characterised healthcare work at task granularity and coded each unique task using a constrained large language model into one dominant transaction-cost category (information search, decision and bargaining, monitoring and enforcement, or adaptation and coordination) together with an overall transaction-cost intensity score. Aggregating to the occupation level, clinician roles exhibited substantially higher transaction-cost intensity than non-clinician roles, driven primarily by greater burdens of information search and decision-related coordination, while dispersion of transaction costs within occupations did not differ. These findings demonstrate systematic heterogeneity in the nature of coordination work across healthcare roles and suggest that the opportunities for digital and AI interventions are unevenly distributed, shaped less by technical task complexity than by underlying coordination structure.

</details>


### [557] [Agentic Frameworks for Reasoning Tasks: An Empirical Study](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.16646)
*Zeeshan Rasheed,Abdul Malik Sami,Muhammad Waseem,Kai-Kristian Kemell,Mika Saari,Pekka Abrahamsson*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 对22个主流智能体框架在三个推理基准测试上的首次大规模实证比较，发现框架选择应优先考虑编排质量（内存控制、失败处理、成本管理），而非推理能力本身。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 尽管智能体框架在复杂推理和决策方面取得进展，但缺乏对其性能、效率和实用性的实证比较证据。本研究旨在填补这一空白。

Method: 从2023年1月至2025年7月收集的1200个GitHub仓库中筛选出22个广泛使用的智能体框架，基于架构设计进行分类。在统一设置下评估它们在BBH、GSM8K和ARC三个推理基准上的表现，测量推理准确率、执行时间、计算成本和跨基准一致性。

Result: 22个框架中19个完成了所有测试，其中12个表现稳定：平均准确率74.6-75.9%，每任务执行时间4-6秒，成本0.14-0.18美分。性能问题主要源于编排问题而非推理限制。数学推理表现显著下降（GSM8K平均准确率44.35%，而BBH和ARC分别为89.80%和89.56%）。

Conclusion: 这是首次针对推理密集型软件工程任务的大规模智能体框架实证比较。研究表明框架选择应优先考虑编排质量，特别是内存控制、失败处理和成本管理，而非单纯追求推理能力。

Abstract: Recent advances in agentic frameworks have enabled AI agents to perform complex reasoning and decision-making. However, evidence comparing their reasoning performance, efficiency, and practical suitability remains limited. To address this gap, we empirically evaluate 22 widely used agentic frameworks across three reasoning benchmarks: BBH, GSM8K, and ARC. The frameworks were selected from 1,200 GitHub repositories collected between January 2023 and July 2025 and organized into a taxonomy based on architectural design. We evaluated them under a unified setting, measuring reasoning accuracy, execution time, computational cost, and cross-benchmark consistency.
  Our results show that 19 of the 22 frameworks completed all three benchmarks. Among these, 12 showed stable performance, with mean accuracy of 74.6-75.9%, execution time of 4-6 seconds per task, and cost of 0.14-0.18 cents per task. Poorer results were mainly caused by orchestration problems rather than reasoning limits. For example, Camel failed to complete BBH after 11 days because of uncontrolled context growth, while Upsonic consumed USD 1,434 in one day because repeated extraction failures triggered costly retries. AutoGen and Mastra also exhausted API quotas through iterative interactions that increased prompt length without improving results.
  We also found a sharp drop in mathematical reasoning. Mean accuracy on GSM8K was 44.35%, compared with 89.80% on BBH and 89.56% on ARC. Overall, this study provides the first large-scale empirical comparison of agentic frameworks for reasoning-intensive software engineering tasks and shows that framework selection should prioritize orchestration quality, especially memory control, failure handling, and cost management.

</details>


### [558] [From Subsumption to Satisfiability: LLM-Assisted Active Learning for OWL Ontologies](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.16672)
*Haoruo Zhao,Wenshuo Tang,Duncan Guthrie,Michele Sevegnani,David Flynn,Paul Harvey*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 该论文提出了一种使用大型语言模型（LLMs）作为第三方组件来辅助主动学习中成员查询（MQs）的方法，通过将候选公理转化为对应的反概念并用受控自然语言表达，让LLMs提供现实世界示例来近似反概念的实例，从而确保在建模过程中只可能出现Type II错误，而不会引入不一致性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 在主动学习中，成员查询（MQs）允许学习者向教师提问，但传统方法存在引入不一致性的风险。该研究旨在利用大型语言模型（LLMs）的能力来提供现实世界示例，从而减少建模过程中的错误类型，特别是避免引入不一致性。

Method: 将每个候选公理转化为其对应的反概念，并用受控自然语言进行表达，然后呈现给大型语言模型（LLMs）。LLMs作为第三方组件提供现实世界示例来近似反概念的实例。这种方法的设计特性确保了在建模过程中只可能出现Type II错误。

Result: 在13个商业LLMs上的实验结果表明，在多个成熟的本体论中，召回率（对应框架中的Type II错误）保持稳定。这意味着该方法能够有效控制错误类型，避免引入不一致性。

Conclusion: 通过引入LLMs作为第三方组件来提供现实世界示例，该方法能够在主动学习的成员查询中有效控制错误类型，确保只出现Type II错误，从而避免引入不一致性，同时保持稳定的召回率。

Abstract: In active learning, membership queries (MQs) allow a learner to pose questions to a teacher, such as ''Is every apple a fruit?'', to which the teacher responds correctly with yes or no. These MQs can be viewed as subsumption tests with respect to the target ontology. Inspired by the standard reduction of subsumption to satisfiability in description logics, we reformulate each candidate axiom into its corresponding counter-concept and verbalise it in controlled natural language before presenting it to Large Language Models (LLMs). We introduce LLMs as a third component that provides real-world examples approximating an instance of the counter-concept. This design property ensures that only Type II errors may occur in ontology modelling; in the worst case, these errors merely delay the construction process without introducing inconsistencies. Experimental results on 13 commercial LLMs show that recall, corresponding to Type II errors in our framework, remains stable across several well-established ontologies.

</details>


### [559] [Agentic Risk-Aware Set-Based Engineering Design](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.16687)
*Varun Kumar,George Em Karniadakis*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 提出基于大语言模型的多智能体框架，用于早期工程设计阶段，通过风险管理和自动化探索辅助人类专家决策。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 早期工程设计阶段面临巨大参数空间和不确定性，传统方法效率低下，需要AI辅助处理高容量分析任务，增强人类专家的决策能力。

Method: 采用基于集合的设计哲学，构建由编码助手、设计代理、系统工程代理和分析代理组成的多智能体系统，通过人类管理者协调。集成正式风险管理（使用CVaR指标），自动化全局敏感性分析，系统探索和筛选初始设计候选集。

Result: 框架成功应用于空气动力学翼型设计问题，能够自动化处理大量分析任务，生成经过风险评估的精选设计候选集，并辅以高保真CFD模拟，有效增强人类专家的决策能力。

Conclusion: 该多智能体框架通过整合AI自动化和正式风险管理，显著提升了早期工程设计的效率和决策质量，为人机协作的工程设计提供了有效范例。

Abstract: This paper introduces a multi-agent framework guided by Large Language Models (LLMs) to assist in the early stages of engineering design, a phase often characterized by vast parameter spaces and inherent uncertainty. Operating under a human-in-the-loop paradigm and demonstrated on the canonical problem of aerodynamic airfoil design, the framework employs a team of specialized agents: a Coding Assistant, a Design Agent, a Systems Engineering Agent, and an Analyst Agent - all coordinated by a human Manager. Integrated within a set-based design philosophy, the process begins with a collaborative phase where the Manager and Coding Assistant develop a suite of validated tools, after which the agents execute a structured workflow to systematically explore and prune a large set of initial design candidates. A key contribution of this work is the explicit integration of formal risk management, employing the Conditional Value-at-Risk (CVaR) as a quantitative metric to filter designs that exhibit a high probability of failing to meet performance requirements, specifically the target coefficient of lift. The framework automates labor-intensive initial exploration through a global sensitivity analysis conducted by the Analyst agent, which generates actionable heuristics to guide the other agents. The process culminates by presenting the human Manager with a curated final set of promising design candidates, augmented with high-fidelity Computational Fluid Dynamics (CFD) simulations. This approach effectively leverages AI to handle high-volume analytical tasks, thereby enhancing the decision-making capability of the human expert in selecting the final, risk-assessed design.

</details>


### [560] [The Query Channel: Information-Theoretic Limits of Masking-Based Explanations](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.16689)
*Erciyes Karakaya,Ozgur Ercetin*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 该论文将基于掩码的后解释方法（如KernelSHAP和LIME）建模为通信信道问题，推导了解释恢复的信息论极限，并实验验证了标准方法在特定查询预算下的失败情况。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有基于掩码的后解释方法（如KernelSHAP和LIME）通过随机扰动查询黑盒模型来估计局部特征重要性，但缺乏理论框架来分析解释的可靠性和查询效率。本文旨在建立信息论框架来量化解释恢复的极限性能。

Method: 将解释过程建模为通信信道：潜在解释作为消息，每个掩码评估作为信道使用。推导了基于熵的解释复杂度和每查询识别容量的信息论极限。提出稀疏最大似然解码器实现可靠恢复，并使用互信息的蒙特卡洛估计器作为查询基准。

Result: 证明了强逆定理：当解释率超过信道容量时，任何解释器和解码器的精确恢复概率必然趋近于错误；同时证明了可达性结果：当速率低于容量时，稀疏最大似然解码器可实现可靠恢复。实验显示存在查询预算范围，信息论允许可靠解释但标准凸代理方法（如Lasso和OLS）仍然失败。

Conclusion: 该研究建立了基于掩码的解释方法的信息论基础，揭示了超像素分辨率和标记化作为设置解释熵的源编码选择，高斯噪声和非线性曲率会降低查询信道性能，导致瀑布和错误平台行为，使高分辨率解释难以实现。

Abstract: Masking-based post-hoc explanation methods, such as KernelSHAP and LIME, estimate local feature importance by querying a black-box model under randomized perturbations. This paper formulates this procedure as communication over a query channel, where the latent explanation acts as a message and each masked evaluation is a channel use. Within this framework, the complexity of the explanation is captured by the entropy of the hypothesis class, while the query interface supplies information at a rate determined by an identification capacity per query. We derive a strong converse showing that, if the explanation rate exceeds this capacity, the probability of exact recovery necessarily converges to one in error for any sequence of explainers and decoders. We also prove an achievability result establishing that a sparse maximum-likelihood decoder attains reliable recovery when the rate lies below capacity. A Monte Carlo estimator of mutual information yields a non-asymptotic query benchmark that we use to compare optimal decoding with Lasso- and OLS-based procedures that mirror LIME and KernelSHAP. Experiments reveal a range of query budgets where information theory permits reliable explanations but standard convex surrogates still fail. Finally, we interpret super-pixel resolution and tokenization for neural language models as a source-coding choice that sets the entropy of the explanation and show how Gaussian noise and nonlinear curvature degrade the query channel, induce waterfall and error-floor behavior, and render high-resolution explanations unattainable.

</details>


### [561] [RankGuide: Tensor-Rank-Guided Routing and Steering for Efficient Reasoning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.16694)
*Jiayi Tian,Yupeng Su,Ryan Solgi,Souvik Kundu,Zheng Zhang*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: RankGuide框架通过张量秩引导的路由和调控，提升小推理模型与大推理模型协作系统的效率和准确性，减少推理延迟。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 大型推理模型虽然能生成多步思维链推理，但推理延迟和计算开销大。小推理模型协作系统能平衡准确性和延迟，但如何有效检测和缓解小推理模型的失败模式仍是关键挑战。

Method: 分析小推理模型在生成文本和隐藏状态空间的推理，识别三种失败模式（过度自信、不确定性和重度重验证）。提出RankGuide框架，利用连续隐藏状态的张量秩信号进行路由检测，当小推理模型可能失败时选择性调用大推理模型，并引入张量秩过滤的调控向量提取方法来改善小推理模型的生成质量。

Result: 在多个推理基准测试中，RankGuide相比大推理模型能减少高达1.75倍的延迟，同时保持与先前方法相当的准确性。

Conclusion: RankGuide通过张量秩信号改进路由和调控，使小推理模型-大推理模型协作系统能够以更少的步骤实现更高效的推理，并提高准确性。

Abstract: Large reasoning models (LRMs) enhance problem-solving capabilities by generating explicit multi-step chains of thought (CoT) reasoning; however, they incur substantial inference latency and computational overhead. To mitigate this issue, recent works have explored model collaboration paradigms, where small reasoning models (SRMs) generate intermediate reasoning steps to achieve a better accuracy--latency trade-off. Despite recent progress, effectively and efficiently detecting and mitigating SRM failures in collaborative systems remains a key challenge. To address this issue, we analyze SRM inference in both the generated text and hidden-state spaces, and identify three types of failure modes: \textit{overconfidence}, \textit{uncertainty}, and \textit{heavy revalidation}. Building on these insights, we propose \textbf{RankGuide}, a framework that improves the efficiency and effectiveness of SRM--LRM collaboration through tensor-rank-guided routing and steering. Specifically, RankGuide leverages a routing signal that incorporates tensor-rank signals derived from consecutive hidden states to detect when SRMs are likely to fail and selectively invoke LRMs. In addition, we introduce a tensor-rank-filtered steering vector extraction method to modulate the reasoning trajectory of SRMs, thereby improving their generation quality. By improving both routing and steering through tensor-rank signals, RankGuide enables SRM--LRM collaborative systems to achieve more efficient reasoning with fewer steps and improved accuracy. Experiments on multiple reasoning benchmarks demonstrate the efficacy of RankGuide in reducing latency by up to $1.75\times$ compared to LRM, while maintaining competitive accuracy relative to prior methods.

</details>


### [562] [Evaluating Tool-Using Language Agents: Judge Reliability, Propagation Cascades, and Runtime Mitigation in AgentProp-Bench](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.16706)
*Bhaskar Gurram*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: AgentProp-Bench是一个包含2000个任务、2300条轨迹的基准测试，用于评估工具使用型LLM代理的自动化评估可靠性。研究发现基于子串的评估与人工标注的一致性仅为偶然水平，而三LLM集成评估能达到中等一致性。参数级错误传播到最终答案的概率约为0.62，拒绝和恢复是独立的能力。运行时拦截器能减少GPT-4o-mini的幻觉，但对Gemini-2.0-Flash无效。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前广泛假设工具使用型LLM代理的自动化评估是可靠的，但这种假设很少通过人工标注进行验证。需要量化评估者的可靠性、表征错误传播，并评估运行时缓解措施的有效性。

Method: 引入AgentProp-Bench基准测试，包含2000个任务、2300条轨迹，涵盖四个领域、九个生产级LLM，以及100个标签的人工验证子集。使用kappa系数衡量评估者可靠性，分析错误传播概率，评估三LLM集成评估方法，并测试运行时拦截器的效果。

Result: 基于子串的评估与人工标注的一致性仅为kappa=0.049（偶然水平）；三LLM集成评估达到kappa=0.432（中等一致性），具有保守偏差。参数级错误传播到最终答案的概率约为0.62（范围0.46-0.73）。拒绝和恢复是独立的能力（Spearman rho=0.126）。调优的运行时拦截器将GPT-4o-mini的幻觉减少了23.0个百分点，但对Gemini-2.0-Flash无显著效果。

Conclusion: 自动化评估工具的可靠性远低于普遍假设，需要更严格的验证。三LLM集成评估能显著提高可靠性。错误传播概率很高，拒绝和恢复是独立的能力。运行时缓解措施的有效性因模型而异。所有代码、数据、轨迹和人工标签已开源。

Abstract: Automated evaluation of tool-using large language model (LLM) agents is widely assumed to be reliable, but this assumption has rarely been validated against human annotation. We introduce AgentProp-Bench, a 2,000-task benchmark with 2,300 traces across four domains, nine production LLMs, and a 100-label human-validated subset. We quantify judge reliability, characterize error propagation, and evaluate a runtime mitigation. Substring-based judging agrees with human annotation at kappa=0.049 (chance-level); a three-LLM ensemble reaches kappa=0.432 (moderate) with a conservative bias. Under validated evaluation, a parameter-level injection propagates to a wrong final answer with human-calibrated probability approximately 0.62 (range 0.46-0.73 across models). Rejection (catching bad parameters) and recovery (correcting after acceptance) are independent model capabilities (Spearman rho=0.126, p=0.747). A tuned runtime interceptor reduces hallucination on GPT-4o-mini by 23.0 percentage points under a concurrent n=600 control, but shows no significant effect on Gemini-2.0-Flash, whose aggressive parameter rejection eliminates the target failure mode. All code, data, traces, and human labels are released at https://github.com/bhaskargurram-ai/agenthallu-bench.

</details>


### [563] [Debate as Reward: A Multi-Agent Reward System for Scientific Ideation via RL Post-Training](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.16723)
*Moein Salimi,Babak Hosseini Mohtasham,Amin Aghakasiri,Mahdi Naieni,Amir Hossein Qeysarbeigi,Mohammad Masih Shalchian Nazer,Zahra Azar,Mahdi Jafari Siavoshani,Mohammad Hossein Rohban*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 提出一个针对高质量科学创意生成的强化学习框架，通过多智能体奖励函数解决奖励黑客问题，在ICLR数据集上显著超越现有方法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前LLM在科学创意生成中存在幻觉和计算效率低的问题，强化学习应用面临奖励黑客的瓶颈，即模型利用不完善的评估代理最大化分数而非产生真正的科学创新。

Method: 提出专门为高质量科学创意生成设计的RL框架，包括首个多智能体奖励函数作为评判者，将方法验证与实现细节解耦，提供严格二元奖励；使用无偏的Group Relative Policy Optimization变体来缓解人工长度偏差；基于ICLR-320数据集进行训练。

Result: 实验表明，该框架在专家评估的新颖性、可行性和有效性指标上显著优于最先进的基线方法。

Conclusion: 提出的强化学习框架有效解决了科学创意生成中的奖励黑客问题，通过专门设计的奖励函数和优化方法，能够产生高质量、创新性的科学想法。

Abstract: Large Language Models (LLMs) have demonstrated potential in automating scientific ideation, yet current approaches relying on iterative prompting or complex multi-agent architectures often suffer from hallucination or computational inefficiency. A critical bottleneck in applying Reinforcement Learning (RL) to this open-ended domain is reward hacking -- where models exploit imperfect evaluation proxies to maximize scores without producing genuine scientific innovation. To address these limitations, we propose an RL framework explicitly tailored for high-quality scientific idea generation. We propose the first multi-agent reward function designed to serve as a judge, decoupling methodological validation from implementation details while providing strict binary rewards that are robust to reward hacking. To effectively optimize against this sparse signal, we utilize an unbiased variant of Group Relative Policy Optimization to mitigate artificial length bias. We grounded our training in ICLR-320, a curated dataset of problem-solution pairs extracted from ICLR 2024 proceedings.
